description: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College cut off 2025 across different exams, courses, and categories will be released soon. Meanwhile, aspirants seeking admission to Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College for MD and MS courses can click on the download now link below to view the past four years' NEET PG cutoff ranks for different categories.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12762 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 12762 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and PG Diploma. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 27756 to 66259. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Anaesthesiology, followed by MD in Pathalogy and MD in Social and Preventive Medicine / Community Medicine. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 27756, 40897 and 55239, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.
In the first round, Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College DM cutoff 2024 was 575 for students in the General AI category. was the toughest to get into.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 894 for DM in Cardiology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 1587.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Aligarh Muslim University admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Aligarh Muslim University. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

hostel_campus.college_name: JNMC Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A college that moulds you into a hardworking and good clinician.
reviews.review_text: We have a lecture theatre for theory classes, labs for all the laboratory skills, and different teaching and seminar rooms for teachers in the hospital wards. The lecture theatre has various technological advancements. A Hostel facility is available, which is quite good. Food is average. Canteens are available.

reviews.review_heading: JNMC: The college of my dreams .
reviews.review_text: The campus is small but beautiful. It is connected to JNMCH through a long corridors. The labs are well-equipped. The book bank is quite well-equipped with ample of books. The hostel is good with decent mess food. We have 2 canteens which also provide affordable and good food.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of college is good.
reviews.review_text: A Wi-Fi facility is available. Library is very good, which includes the issuing of medical books for a year. Classrooms are good and air-conditioned. Canteen is very bad and unhygienic; even the mess and food quality are not so good, especially for vegetarians. There is no computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: It has good clinical exposure. Our college and hostel life is better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and students can feel the beauty of nature. Classrooms are air-conditioned, practical laboratories are fine, and demonstration rooms are better because 20-30 students are taught there at a time. The hostel infrastructure is good with a big playground, average canteen, fine dining, and rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, well-qualified teachers, beautiful campus, and Wi-Fi connectivity.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good and Wi-Fi enabled. The whole university has Wi-Fi. The labs in our college are fully-equipped with the instruments required, and all the lab assistants are eager to help. The lecture theaters are spacious enough with a seating capacity of around 200 people, well-furnished and well-conditioned with enough air conditioners. The library is very spacious where a maximum of 200 students can study at a time. It is a very well place with zero disturbance with air-conditioners. The h...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in terms of education but not so much for extra-curriculars.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of this prestigious institute is one of the best that a medical college can offer. Since the university is a central government-aided university, it receives monetary grants for educational and various co-curricular developments. The facilities provided are at par with the best medical colleges in the country.

reviews.review_heading: Most underrated medical college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure but the first-year lecture hall doesn't have an air conditioner. So in summers, it becomes quite difficult. The boys' hostel is super cool. Has almost more than 500 rooms but you may not end up getting a room in the first year as most of the rooms are occupied by 9th - 10th grade students that's a sad part.

reviews.review_heading: There are the best faculty members, but hostels are not very satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are neat. The library is the best thing here. The hostel rooms are not much great and are small and not properly ventilated. The rooms are sharing-based, and two students stay per room. However, all this will be compensated for the hostel fees, which is less as it is included in the college fee of Rs. 6,500 for the year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the many things foe which AMU is known, the campus is really big and well maintained, the Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus and has a good speed and range, the labs are up to date with the latest technologies and the Library has a very quiet and peaceful atmosphere which is ideal for readers. One thing that I find a little annoying is the absence of canteens inside the campus of JNMC, AMU otherwise all things are great. All kind of sports are available for but y...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college and its hospital are located on the same premises. The most important thing is they are near to our hostel. Free Wi-Fi is provided by our university. There is mess and canteen, and some indoor games and outdoor sports and grounds are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, AMU.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi and laboratories are available. Classrooms are also available and library is provided for students. Hostel life is not good, and sports and games are good. Canteen is also not good, but medical facility is available. In this college, very less functions are organised.

reviews.review_heading: Our college makes doctors with decent skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
It is a very green college, and most of the classrooms are air- 
 conditioned. Wi-Fi and labs are very decent, and up to the mark. Hostel rooms are spacious but are slightly less. Two people can accommodate in a single room which is slightly disappointing. The food served is just fine, and one can manage. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in UP.
reviews.review_text: There are 5 state-of-the-art air-conditioned lecture theatres. 24x7 high-speed Wi-Fi is available inside the campus. Every department has its own laboratory, which is equipped with modern instruments. There is a huge library inside the campus and a reading room in the hostel. Both the library and reading room are air-conditioned. There are many sports grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, badminton and many more.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. It is the best college for me, and it has good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available here. There are labs, classrooms and a library. Sports are good. The canteen is poor, and medical facilities are available. There are games, and very few functions are organised. College and hostel life are horrible here. The library is open for a specific time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but you will miss city life like Lucknow, Delhi, etc.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. The first-year students are getting a new hall, which is in very good condition. Floors are very properly tiled. Washrooms are attached to a very spacious room, which is shared by two people, but it is very comfortable. It has 24 hours light and water supplies. There are people to clean the rooms and corridor, so you will find very clean spaces. You will get a huge boys cricket ground with proper lighting is there where you can also play football and a lot of other sports. Spor...

Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology is famous for its popular programmes such as BTech and MBA. These courses are offered at the UG and PG levels for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. The university offers these courses in full-time mode and across several specialisations. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for students with a history of arrears in our department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good, but AC in labs and classrooms would have been nice. Classrooms and bathrooms are not great, but manageable. It is still one of the best universities in Chennai, and this is not an excuse. A bus is available for almost every route in Chennai. Lunch is the best time with a good meal, both veg and non-veg. Lively canteen. The campus is walkable, giving it a pretty much Karan Johar college life.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is good enough, and teachers are good, but security is rude and not helpful. They should understand they are here to work for us and serve us, not the other way around. Attendance is strict, and students cannot roam around freely. If you enter the campus in the morning, you have to stay until evening. Exams are easy. They are given the question bank at the start of every semester. Dean is super egoistic, but he won't come in your way if you don't cross him. Professors are chill most of the time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 75 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our college is about 5 to 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are like Google and Amazon. .
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and computer labs are very perfect. The quality in our hostel facility is so good. The quality in our mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

overview_faqs.answer: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology fee refund policy decision is on Board of Management. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form.

review_summary.college_name: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and management .

content.Placements: Around 65 to 70 percent of students from my batch were placed. The packages range from 3 LPA to 8 LPA and an average of 4 to 4.5 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Cognizant. Common roles offered were software engineer, system engineer, and associate developer.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities were well maintained with good mess and canteen food. Medical facilities and sports rooms were available. It makes campus life comfortable. Overall, the campus provided a safe and student friendly environment. And also, the mess food is really good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: There were more than 1600 offers to date as of 22-01-2026 for the 2026 passed-out students. The highest package is 41 LPA offered by Amazon for many students. Computer Science and Engineering has many offers. The roles offered range from the top position to the lowest.
content.Infrastructure: There are many labs and Wi-Fi facilities on campus. Every classroom is equipped with a digital smart projector. The library is vast and has a lot of useful books. There is an emergency hospital and a dental hospital for emergency facilities. NCC and NSS are encouraged and given priority.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: There are no placements for students with a history of arrears in our department.
content.Infrastructure: Good, but AC in labs and classrooms would have been nice. Classrooms and bathrooms are not great, but manageable. It is still one of the best universities in Chennai, and this is not an excuse. A bus is available for almost every route in Chennai. Lunch is the best time with a good meal, both veg and non-veg. Lively canteen. The campus is walkable, giving it a pretty much Karan Johar college life.
content.Faculty: Faculty is good enough, and teachers are good, but security is rude and not helpful. They should understand they are here to work for us and serve us, not the other way around. Attendance is strict, and students cannot roam around freely. If you enter the campus in the morning, you have to stay until evening. Exams are easy. They are given the question bank at the start of every semester. Dean is super egoistic, but he won't come in your way if you don't cross him. Professors are chill most of the time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: Approximately 75 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our college is about 5 to 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are like Google and Amazon. .
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and computer labs are very perfect. The quality in our hostel facility is so good. The quality in our mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The review indicated the importance of my college and the facilities it provides.

content.Placements: Placements are average to good with many mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Cognizant. A few core and product companies visit for top performers. Training and placement cell provides aptitude and soft skill support, and it is a good college for interdisciplinary.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has good infrastructure with modern classrooms, labs, and library. Hostels are well-maintained with basic facilities, decent food, and proper safety security by the college staff over there. The food is common to everyone, and it is free of cost.

admission_overview.description: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology admission 2026 is merit-based for some while entrance-based for other courses. Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology has over 23 courses at UG, PG, and PhD level in Engineering, Law, Business Administration, Nursing, Pharmacy, Arts, Science, Humanities, Allied Health Sciences, Dental Sciences, Design, and Architecture. The courses are offered through 11 schools of SIST Chennai. The mode of application is online for all courses. Apart from the regular degree programmes, Sathyabama also extends online courses at the Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE). The admission process starts with filling Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology application form followed by the merit score of eligible candidates. Students who will qualify for the Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE) will get shortlisted through the merit list released on the official website of the university. Candidates can check the merit lists through the candidate's registered login ID and password, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

placement_data.title: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest and average package offered during Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology placements 2025 were INR 41.20 LPA and INR 5.57 LPA , respectively. A total 3007 students have been placed in top companies. Further, 301 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed 91.43% students of the 2025 batch.

Earlier, a total of 406 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed 3,015 students of the batch 2023. The highest and average package offered during Sathyabama placements in 2023 was INR 53 LPA and INR 5.40 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology in 2023 included Amazon, Hitachi, Ernst & Young, Publicis Sapient, Hyundai, Kaar Technologies, HCL, Comcast India, IBM, Oracle, Federal Bank , etc.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Sathyabama University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 2 ranks to #53 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Sathyabama University fell 1 rank to #67 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sathyabama University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.

facilities: Consists of a rich collection of more than 5,00,000 books, 250+ print journals, 16,000+ publications, e-journals, an online database, project muse, online resources, and others.

A general hospital with 100 bedded facilities and round-the-clock availability of doctors is serving not only the students but also the general public through mega dental camps and regular medical services.

The University provides campus residential accommodation facilities to their enrolled students. Both male and female candidates can be allowed to stay in the hostel based on the availability of the rooms.
Sathyabama has 12 badminton courts, 2 kabaddi courts, 2 table tennis, cricket grounds, a yoga hall, and 3 basketball courts.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and management .
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were well maintained with good mess and canteen food. Medical facilities and sports rooms were available. It makes campus life comfortable. Overall, the campus provided a safe and student friendly environment. And also, the mess food is really good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs and Wi-Fi facilities on campus. Every classroom is equipped with a digital smart projector. The library is vast and has a lot of useful books. There is an emergency hospital and a dental hospital for emergency facilities. NCC and NSS are encouraged and given priority.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Good, but AC in labs and classrooms would have been nice. Classrooms and bathrooms are not great, but manageable. It is still one of the best universities in Chennai, and this is not an excuse. A bus is available for almost every route in Chennai. Lunch is the best time with a good meal, both veg and non-veg. Lively canteen. The campus is walkable, giving it a pretty much Karan Johar college life.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and computer labs are very perfect. The quality in our hostel facility is so good. The quality in our mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The review indicated the importance of my college and the facilities it provides.
reviews.review_text: Campus has good infrastructure with modern classrooms, labs, and library. Hostels are well-maintained with basic facilities, decent food, and proper safety security by the college staff over there. The food is common to everyone, and it is free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good infrastructure and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. There are good professors and well-educated lab technician. The surroundings are always clean and neat. The bus facilities are not good as they arrange less buses for more students. Nearly 10,000 students are studying so the college is always busy.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are provided every year. I am fully satisfied with our college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and lab facilities that are equipped with various equipment and Wi-Fi connections all over. There is a sufficient number of laboratories for each subject with efficient materials, and a large space has been allotted for each laboratory.

reviews.review_heading: Good and best for studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college. Canteen and library are also nice. Our college ambiance is excellent. Medical facilities are also available in our college. In mess, food quality is good. Daily non-veg is provided in our mess hall. Cool water facilities are also there in our campus.

reviews.review_heading: A few friendly faculty members expect everyone to be like that.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, and the labs are well-equipped with equipment. The Wi - Fi facility is available near the library. The mess food is not so bad when compared to other colleges, and not so good that the canteen is always crowded. You can't expect it to be so good, some half of the dish and juice are overpriced and taste bad.

reviews.review_heading: Really great in placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are updated to modern technology, and the infrastructure is also very good. Sometimes the Wi-Fi connections are poor. When it comes to labs, classrooms, and the library, they are great. The food in our college is perfect and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: The college has poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: To be candid, the infrastructure operates on a strict policy of 'bare minimum. If viewed in isolation, the facilities are functional and liveable. The basics are there. However, the moment you benchmark our campus against peer institutions, the deficit becomes glaring. We are lagging significantly in modernization and maintenance, making the campus feel adequate only to those who haven't seen better alternatives.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in IT industry.
reviews.review_text: The course is of very high quality, and the sports facilities are also good. The food provided is of good quality and is free for day scholars, and a free bus facility is available. Security on campus is well maintained, and there is no dress code.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure with good ambience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college canteen, and the library is also nice. Our college ambiance is excellent. Medical facilities are also available in our college. The mess food quality is good. Daily non-vegetarian food is provided in our mess hall, and cool water facilities are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very good. The library contains many books according to your department, allowing you to learn general knowledge as well. Wi-Fi is in very good condition. The courses offered also include specializations.

reviews.review_heading: Good for education and a better future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college, and the library is full of books for study. Labs are very clean, and the ambiance of the labs is good. The classroom ambiance is also good in our college. Sports and games are also conducted. The mess and canteen are also good.

highlights.summary: The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

placements.overview: The Karnataka College of Pharmacy has an active placement cell that offers job assistance to its students. Out of 40 students, 20 were placed during the PG 2-year placement drive 2022. The median package recorded that year was 3.25 LPA.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college, best faculty and management.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students will be placed. 6 lakhs is the highest and 3 lakhs is the lowest salary offered. There should be improvement in placement because fewer placements take place. Apollo and other companies offer jobs. All students will get internships in different companies. The top role offered is drug inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good library facilities and good smart board classrooms, with well-equipped labs for practical work. Good hostel facilities with food and a canteen are available on campus. Medical facilities are available and there is good support for extracurricular activities like sports and cultural events, including competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Karnataka College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Our college has average placements. During the sixth year, students get internships at the Bangalore Baptist Hospital, which helps them prepare for the next few steps. The college helps students develop work skills. Top role offered is a pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is stacked with many informative books that are available to all students studying at the college. Sports like basketball, volleyball, and table tennis are all conducted within the college. Labs are filled with up-to-date technology. The canteen provides excellent food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of faculty members, encouragement for sports and cultural activities.

review_content.Placements: We had placement interviews, but none of the students was interested in getting a job. Top roles offered in our course are pharmacist, clinical research, clinical data management, clinical data coordinator, drug safety associate, etc. Almost 80% of the students got internships from reputed hospitals and pharmaceutical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library, classrooms and lab facilities are good. The hostel food is not that good, and it is below average. Even the hostel facility is average. Sports and games are conducted in our college yearly once, and during that time, faculty members encourage us to participate.

admission_overview.college_name: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Courses, Application, Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Karnataka College of Pharmacy admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based. The college offers courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels in the field of Pharmacy. The college offers BPharm at UG, MPharm at PG, and DPharm at diploma levels. Karnataka College of Pharmacy accepts students based on the scores secured by them in either national or state-level entrance exams, such as KCET, followed by COMEDK counselling for seat allotment. The application process for the college mainly commences online. Interested students can go through the following article to learn all about the admission process and criteria for Karnataka College of Pharmacy.

eligibility_selection.title: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Karnataka College of Pharmacy course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students need to meet both the basic eligibility along with clearing the selection rounds to get a seat at the college. The college accepts students mostly on an entrance basis. Some of the exams accepted by the college include KCET and PGCET. The college follows the norms of the Karnataka Examinations Authority (KEA) for seat allotment to its pharmacy courses. Karnataka College of Pharmacy UG admission requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent with PCB from a recognised board

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry & Biology and a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board
BPharma or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 55% from a recognised university

admission_process.title: Karnataka College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Karnataka College of Pharmacy admission procedureincludes application, selection process, counselling and admission confirmation. Students should complete the process to get seat at the college.Karnataka College of Pharmacyonline admission processis mentioned below:
Apply and Register

Visit the official website and apply online. Students can get the application form from the college campus as well. At the time of filling the form, students should have documents such as marksheets, certificates, Aadhaar Card and entrance exam scorecards ready with them.
Selection Process
Selection is done basis merit in the last qualifying exam. Those applying under the government quota should participate in the KEA counselling process for BPharm seat allotment.
Admission Confirmation
After the admission offer is made, payKarnataka College of Pharmacy feeto confirm the seat.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching, good infrastructure, and the library is great.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very well-equipped. The library provides good books which is the latest one. The canteen is good. Sports week is organized once a year. Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are neat. The hostel food is a bit okay. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Two years of KCP for lifetime memories.
reviews.review_text: Well, the laboratory and library are furnished, and projectors are available in all the classrooms. Wi-Fi is there but with a very slow internet connection. The canteen is there on the campus, and a small playground is in the campus with one big ground available on the south side of the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, best faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: The college has good library facilities and good smart board classrooms, with well-equipped labs for practical work. Good hostel facilities with food and a canteen are available on campus. Medical facilities are available and there is good support for extracurricular activities like sports and cultural events, including competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Karnataka College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The library is stacked with many informative books that are available to all students studying at the college. Sports like basketball, volleyball, and table tennis are all conducted within the college. Labs are filled with up-to-date technology. The canteen provides excellent food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, encouragement for sports and cultural activities.
reviews.review_text: The library, classrooms and lab facilities are good. The hostel food is not that good, and it is below average. Even the hostel facility is average. Sports and games are conducted in our college yearly once, and during that time, faculty members encourage us to participate.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is the Wi-Fi facility in both college campus and hostel. Every year, our college organise the sports and cultural programs for the students. Every facility for sports and all type of games will be promoted on our campus. Our classrooms are also good. The labs are good and well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a very good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice infrastructure. The buildings are super, and it is developing day by day. The theory and practical classes are better than most of the colleges in India. The college has highly managed new equipment for the students. We were glad to study in the college. And we had a great experience.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied because of its faculty, good environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Karnataka is quite good. The college is getting upgraded, and construction is going on. The new look inside is just awesome. There is no Free Wi-Fi available on the campus. The labs are good. They maintain cleanliness, all the chemicals and equipment are available.  The library is fine. It's not beautiful but okay. The worst part of the college is the washrooms and toilets. Its very badly maintained. The quality of the food in the canteen is not good. Because most of my...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements, infrastructure and the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is available, but you won't get access to it unless you password. Even for M.Pharm students, it is not accessible, and we only have to install a new connection for our use like projects and all. We have to collect money, and pay and that internet will be very much used by staffs only. In this college, you have to pay for everything like for freshers party, farewell, college days etc. and even for some seminars also you have to pay. The labs are good, but they lack some chemicals and in...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory college, average faculty, good placements, average crowd
reviews.review_text: We didn't have any Wi-Fi facilities there. There were some flaws in classrooms which were not really fixed, furniture was satisfactory, labs were also satisfactory, but the library was the best which had a variety of books available. Hostel rooms were good enough but not the meals provided there. There were no medical facilities and in the last year due to covid, we didn't get the games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Outstanding ! I'm satisfied to be part of Karnataka college. I think this is best choice for myself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is just awesome. There is proper availability of laboratory, libraries, medical facilities, sports area, classroom also well maintained. There is well maintenance of the exam hall. Separate cabin are also available for all faculty teachers.

college_info.intro:
Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini offers a wide range of programmes at the UG, Diploma, and Certificate levels. The flagship programmes offered at MIAPE include BSc. The college offers this programme across several specialisations such as BSc in Medical Radiology Imaging Technology, BSc in Operation Theatre Technology, BSc in Cardiovascular Technology (Cath Lab), etc.
Admission to the majority of courses requires candidates to qualify Class 12 with PCB/ PCM with an age limit of 17 years. The duration of the BSc is 3 years, with 2 years of theory and 1 year of internship. The fee structure of BSc includes tuition fees ranging from INR 3.8 Lakh to INR 3.95 Lakh. Candidates can check the Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini popular programmes in the table given below:

The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by the dedicated Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE), Rohini placement team. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies. Further, the placement assistance involves various steps such as Pre-placement session, Mock interviews, Evaluation -placement perspective, and Final placement offer.

MIAPE offers courses such as BSc, BVoc, Diploma and Certificate on the basis of merit. The college offers a BSc Programme across several specialisations, such as BSc in Medical Radiology Imaging Technology, BSc in Medical Laboratory Technology, etc. The duration of the BSc programme at the UG level is 3 years and includes a comprehensive curriculum. In addition to this, the college also offers a wide range of certificate and diploma-level programmes. paragraphs: Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohini admission 2025is merit-based. The institute offers a variety of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Science, Healthcare, Education, etc. In addition to UG and PG courses, students can also pursue diploma courses. To get admitted to the institute, students must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atMax Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohiniis carried out online. Interested students can read the following article to learn all aboutMax Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohini.

Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohini course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset admission criteria. Candidates applying for undergraduate courses need to ensure that students pass Class 12 from a recognised board. The admission procedure for Max Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohini, includes multiple steps, such as application, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Students can apply for the course by filling out the application form available at the website.
STEP 1: Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://www.maxhealthcare.in, for admission to the various programmes. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute selects students based on merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: PI & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMax Institute of Allied & Paramedical Education (MIAPE) Rohini feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

admission_overview.college_name: YBN University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: YBN University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: YBN University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts entrance exam for courses such as MBA, BBA, PhD, etc.YBN University Ranchioffers98 UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmessuch as BHMS, BSc, B.Ed, BTech, Diploma in Engineering, Diploma in Journalism, MSc Information Technology, MBA, MPH, etc. across18 schools, namely School of Legal Studies, School of Medical Sciences, School of Nursing, School of Education, among others.

YBN University Ranchi offers multiple programmes under various disciplines, namely Science, Engineering and Technology, Law, Journalism and Mass Communication, Computer Science and Information Technology, Arts and Humanities, etc. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. Below are popularYBN University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with PCB/ PCM
Merit-based
Class 12 with PCB/ PCM
Merit-based
Merit-based
BSc in relevant discipline
Merit-based
Class 12 with PCB
Merit-based

YBN University admission process includes multiple steps. Candidates are first required to register for the preferred programme followed by participating in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in YBN University:
STEP 1: YBN University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to apply with the basic details to generate login credentials. Additionally, candidates need to login and fill out the application form for the preferred course. Aspirants need to upload a photograph as a document in the application form.
STEP 2: Selection

YBN University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts CAT, XAT and other Management entrance exams for MBA admission. YBN also conducts an entrance test for BBA programme.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
Once the selection process is over, aspirants need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee.

facilities: Infrastructure: The campus might have well-designed buildings, academic blocks, administrative offices, libraries, laboratories, and research centers.
Green Spaces: Universities often have green and landscaped areas, gardens, and open spaces where students can relax and study.
Hostel Facilities: For outstation students, the campus could offer hostel accommodations with basic amenities.
Cafeteria and Dining Facilities: There might be canteens or cafeterias that provide food options for students and staff.
Sports and Recreational Facilities: Universities often have sports grounds, indoor sports complexes, gyms, and other facilities to promote physical fitness and extracurricular activities.
Auditoriums and Seminar Halls: Spaces for organizing academic events, seminars, conferences, and cultural programs.
Technology and Connectivity: Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus to facilitate access to online resources.
Medical Facilities: Some universities may have medical centres or tie-ups with nearby hospitals to provide medical assistance to students and staff.
Student Activity Centers: Places where students can engage in various clubs, societies, and extracurricular activities.
Security Measures: Universities often have security arrangements to ensure the safety of students and the campus.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: LM College of Pharmacy offers diploma, PG, and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Pharmacy and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers full-time, four-year BPharm courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year MPharm course to students. The college also provides PharmD (PB), PharmD, DPharm, and other courses to students. Some of these courses are Self-Financed programmes, whereas some are Grant-In-Aid courses. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and LM College of Pharmacy fees:

faqs.answer: A:    LM College of Pharmacy (LMCP) is located in Ahmedabad and was founded by the Ahmedabad Education Society. To be eligible for B.Pharma at the college, the candidate must have completed 10+2 (Science Stream) from a single board with three subjects with Physics and Chemistry as two compulsory subjects and a third subject as an optional subject from Mathematics or Biology as prescribed by the concerned board, from any recognized board.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Pharma at LM College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    LM College of Pharmacy BPharma admissions are based on entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams are  GUJCET,  and others. Students must prepare well for the accepted entrance exams to not miss a chance of getting admission. Prior preparation is important for students as the competition is quite high.
faqs.question: Can I take admission in B.Pharma at L M College of Pharmacy without any entrance exams?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, after obtaining a graduation degree in pharmacy, candidates can secure a government job in pharmaceutical sciences or in any other field of their choosing. BPharma prepares students to make a career in pharmacy and introduces them to important concepts like drug synthesis, manufacture, quality control, safety etc.After doing BPharma at LM College of Pharmacy, students can apply to work in government-run dispensaries or medical programmes. They can also study further to get into manufacturing and research of government-run drug programmes.
faqs.question: Can I secure a government job by studying B.Pharma at L M College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    If you have a diploma in pharmacy you can apply for to Diploma to Degree programme (D to D) in the university and enrol yourself in the Bachelor’s in Pharmacy programme of the institution. You can also continue your diploma into a bachelor’s programme if you’re a diploma student at the same university.If you’re a native of the state of Gujarat and have completed your diploma degree from an educational institute based in Gujarat, you can apply for the Mukhyamantri Yuva Swavalamban Yojana (MYSY) scholarship to help fund your education while you make the transition from Diploma to Bachelors.
faqs.question: Is there a way to convert my D.Pharma into B.Pharm?

reviews_list.review_title: The college has good teaching faculty and placements, but a very strict attendance policy.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are Zydus, Cadila, Intas Pharmaceutical, Sun Pharma, Johnson&Johnson, etc. The highest package offered is 11 LPA, the average package offered is 4.50 LPA and the lowest package is 3.50 LPA. Annually, 25 undergraduates and 37 post graduates are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Experienced, dedicated and expert faculty members are hired for each department. They provide guidance for competitive examinations like GPAT and even conduct Pre-GPAT exam. The campus’ placement percentage is almost 100% for the postgraduate students. More than 60% of the graduates are settled in USA. The Laboratories are well-equipped with high quality instruments, lecture theater, spacious seminar hall and an auditorium. There is a Library with Wi-Fi facility enriched with national and international books, scientific journals and thesis. They signed MOUs with leading Pharmacy Company which is Zydus Pharmaceuticals. LMCP has a fully functional Atal Incubation Centre (AIC) which encourages and supports the students for entrepreneurship. The faculty members help and promote the students to participate in National and International level scientific conferences, workshops, and competitive activities. They even encourage the students to participate in state and national level sports competitions. The students results at the University and competitive examinations of GATE, GPAT, NAPLEX, TOEFL, etc. have been excellent. A highly disciplined and research oriented environment is provided here.

overview_faqs.question: When did B.Pharm start at L M College of Pharmacy?
overview_faqs.answer: LM College of Pharmacy was set up in 1947 by the philanthropic trust, Ahmedabad Education Society, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad. Its first programme was the Bachelor of Pharmacy programme and at the time it was affiliated with Bombay University.This makes the institution more than 77 years old. LM College of Pharmacy is now affiliated with Gujarat Technical University and is approved by both the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). Now the university carries close to 10 courses ranging from a diploma in pharmacy to a doctorate in pharmacy.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Pharm at L M College of Pharmacy approved by PCI?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, LM College of Pharmacy is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). Furthermore, the LM College of Pharmacy is affiliated with Gujarat Technical University.LM College of Pharmacy offers diploma and undergraduate programmes in Pharmacy as grant-in-aid programmes, as well as, programmes like Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D), Pharm.D Post Baccalaureate (PB), Post-graduation in Pharmacy as self-financed programmes. The grant-in-aid programmes are funded by public institutions and the self-financed programmes are self-financed by the institution.

admission_process.title: L M College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: L M College of Pharmacy (LMCP Ahmedabad)is one of the premier pharmaceutical and research institutes of Gujarat, established in 1947. The institute is affiliated toGujarat Technological University (GTU Ahmedabad)and is approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). The institute is associated with Zydus Hospitals, Ahmedabad to train its pharmaceutical graduates.

The institute offers BPharm and PharmD at UG, MPharm at PG, and PhD at the doctorate level. Besides these, the institute also offers DPharm to students as a grant-in-aid programme. L M College of Pharmacy admission is entrance-based. Applications to seek admission in the institute are invited both in online and offline mode.

lists: Candidates must appear forGUJ-CETfor admission to BPharm and PharmD programme
Candidate must apply for the institute in the further counselling round to reserve a seat for BPharm
To apply for MPharm programme, candidates must appear forGPAT
Candidates applying for MPharm must have a BPharm degree from an institute recognised by the PCI
Admission to PhD (Pharmacy) is based on an entrance exam conducted by the University, followed by a personal interview (PI) round

Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #45 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Pharmacy. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the LM College of Pharmacy rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Gujarat In 2025

nirf.description:
LM College of Pharmacy has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, LM College of Pharmacy climbed 7 ranks to #45 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: LM College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good place for the pharmacy students and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are average because it has been made since 1947 and not renovated. So, infrastructure is like poor, but also good. The classroom is okay but not much because it's very poor and sometimes something happens, like a rat dying. Food quality in our canteen is also good. They have sports and games and win with gratitude.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment with nice faculty and great education.
reviews.review_text:
2 buildings: 1 main building and another for Pharma.D are there. 
Labs are clean and well maintained; classrooms are clean and well arranged. Has its own pet house consisting of animals for research. The washrooms are cleaned on a daily basis. Campus consists of 2 libraries.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good teaching faculty and placements, but a very strict attendance policy.
reviews.review_text: Experienced, dedicated and expert faculty members are hired for each department. They provide guidance for competitive examinations like GPAT and even conduct Pre-GPAT exam. The campus’ placement percentage is almost 100% for the postgraduate students. More than 60% of the graduates are settled in USA. The Laboratories are well-equipped with high quality instruments, lecture theater, spacious seminar hall and an auditorium. There is a Library with Wi-Fi facility enriched with national and intern...

reviews.review_heading: Good for pharmacy educational courses I.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and sports facilities are good but hostel problems are there in our college this time. Some rules and regulations are also there, which are good for students. Free Wi-Fi is also there. Good communication skills are there with faculty members .

reviews.review_heading: In this college, all the faculty were very good and educated.
reviews.review_text: There are no college hostels in campus. You can find many hostels and PGs nearby the college. May be it will cost high but you can find them easily near college. It costs around INR 6,000 per month in PG and hostel costs around INR 45,000 per semester.

reviews.review_heading: It has a huge campus, and many other students from the country are studying in our college.
reviews.review_text: There is a good Wi-Fi facility, and every lab is available. We have good classrooms, and a library is also available in the college. Hostel facility is not so good but the food served is best in our mess. Canteen medical facility, and sports and games are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good quality of education for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good, and it will give you a feel of the 1950s. The library is one of the best things here, and some books are very rare. Classrooms are good, but there is no Wi-Fi facility here. Labs are developing, and you can get access to so many instruments.

reviews.review_heading: Really good and helpful faculty to every student.
reviews.review_text: In our course, we have a library, laboratories for each course, canteen, classrooms, and a projector room. Wi-Fi is reachable to the whole campus so there is no issue for the reachability. Labs are clean and well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Good college satisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Sophisticated labs were available with access to all instruments related to the study. The library had access to a wide range of books, journals, and recent manuscripts. The quality of the hostel was average. The quality of food was also average. For sports and games facilities were quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty in HAP and Pharmaceutical Organic Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: There has been no boy's hostel in this college for many years they say it is under construction but I don't think it is true. No boy's hostel is available on campus for boys and girls. They say there is a hostel for girls but not for boys, the hostel is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and infrastructure would recommend.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostels were average, not too good, not too bad. The classrooms were a bit small from that I was expecting, but there was Wi-Fi service available that helped everyone in studying. The canteen was clean, and the food was served in a good manner.

reviews.review_heading: Life at L.M. College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but classrooms could be better. Laboratories are good for chemistry and pharmacology practicals, but the pharmacognosy and pharmaceutics departments need to improve laboratories. The college has a good canteen, the library is up to date, and all the books are there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Sports facilities are available in our college. The infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: My college are good at providing facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment. Classrooms have projectors, the library has ACs. Sports courts and big ground for the students. Quality of food available in this college is better than other colleges. Hostel rooms are comfortable with Wi-Fi facility.

college_info.college_name: LM College of Pharmacy Scholarship Details

paragraphs: LM College of Pharmacy does not provide any kind of scholarship or financial aid to the students to fund their education. However, students can use public scholarships at LM College of Pharmacy to aid their education at the institution.

Every scholarship has a certain idea, like Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSSS) is specifically open for students from Jammu and Kashmir, whereas, a scholarship like Mukhyamantri Yuva Sawavalamban Yojna (MYSY) is open for native students of Gujarat. You can find the eligibility criteria for different scholarships on the university website.

highlights.summary: DAVV - Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admissions 2026 are currently open. As per the NIRF 2025 rankings, DAVV ranks #49 under the category 'State Public University'.

table.details: - Ranked 49 under the category 'State Public University' by the NIRF Ranking. - Ranked 151-200 by the NIRF Ranking under the 'University' category.

college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses can apply on the official website of Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya. At the UG level, the university offers three to five-year BTech/ B.E., BSc, BBA, and other courses to students. BE/ BTech is the flagship prorgamme offered at DAVV, and is offered in 6 specialisations. At the PG level, the university offers two to five-year MBA, MSc, and various other courses to students. The university also provides diploma, certificate, and various other courses to students.
DAVV Indore is known for its popular programmes such as BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as Accenture, Cognizant, Amazon, and others. Below mentioned are the DAVV Indore courses, their respective eligibility and fee:

review_content.General: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped with all the workout equipment, and the charges are 400 rupees per month.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College facilities are not that good when compared to their fees and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good, but I think they can be improved. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package offered ranges from 10-12 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 2-3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The infrastructure of the college can be better and more presentable according to its fee. In my opinion, the quality of food is not good, but they can improve it. Sports competitions are held in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and placement, as heard by me, but I have not experienced the placement part.

review_content.Placements: I have heard that 50 to 70% of students get placed every year in my branch, which is the IT B.Tech. The highest on-campus package, which I heard was 31 LPA, and the average was 5 LPA, which probably means off-campus was much more. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. It's not the best, but average. If you have skills and a decent GPA above 7, you can easily get placed in good companies. An internship is offered in the last year, I guess, as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi doesn't work at all. You need to get its password, which is hardly possible. The network doesn't work at all. This college has a library of its own and has all the labs, good classrooms, and smart classes as well. It also has a lift for disabled people and teachers. There is no hostel of its own, but you can see one. Other than that, it does have its canteen and a café near the canteen. It has a stationery and juice shop. It has a photocopy and printout facility. Lab manuals are available in stationery. The library offers many books, including course books, but you should first get your library card.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: Candidates must take part in the DAVV admission process before the last date of admission. DAVV application form must be filled out before the last date of application. Candidates must know their eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. The university offers UG, PG, and various other courses to students. The fees for MBA at DAVV is tabulated below: CoursesTotal tuition FeesMBA/PGDM (103 courses)INR 30,800 - INR 2.4 lakh

overview_faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I cancel my admission from DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: In DAVV, fees once paid will be fully refunded. But the university have some rules and regulation to be followed by the candidates to get full refund. If any candidate wants to cancel the admission, he / she should be apply in prescribed proforma. To fill out the proforma, candidates are required to visit the university official website. In case, if any candidate leaves the program, the fees will be refunded as per the guidelines of UGC. If a candidate leaves any program after the said date, only caution money will be refunded.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any online fee payment portal at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya?
overview_faqs.answer: DAV has an online fee payment portal. The university provides a single platform to submit all fees. Visit DAV website and click on the online fee payment tab. Choose the courses to enrol in and proceed with the payment. It will redirect to a payment gateway, where fees can be paid using a debit card, credit card, or net banking.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for UG and PG programmes of DAVV?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for both UG and PG programmes at DAVV University is the same. Students applying to either UG or PG programmes have to pay an application fee of INR 1550.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in comparison to other Madhya Pradesh government medical colleges.

content.Placements: In India, there is a lack of healthcare workers, especially good doctors, so all students are well settled and placed in different hospitals. The highest package in the MBBS course totally depends on you and your capabilities. In MBBS, after 4.5 years, we have to do a 1-year internship in our college-associated hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has most of the things found in the best medical colleges. Our college has a large building area, and above-average facilities are available. The quality of food is also good, provided for 2200 Rs. Our canteen is not that great, and the sports area is also average, with all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 1st year of the SGSITS Indore Electrical Engineering branch. Approximately 60% of the total students were placed in core and technical sectors. The highest package was 19 LPA offered by ORACLE Inc. in a technical role. The average was 7.5 LPA. The lowest package was 3.5 LPA offered by TCS. The top recruiters include Havells, Oracle, Deloitte, and TCS. The top roles were in core and technical sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped with all the workout equipment, and the charges are 400 rupees per month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College facilities are not that good when compared to their fees and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are good, but I think they can be improved. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package offered ranges from 10-12 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 2-3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The infrastructure of the college can be better and more presentable according to its fee. In my opinion, the quality of food is not good, but they can improve it. Sports competitions are held in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and placement, as heard by me, but I have not experienced the placement part.

content.Placements: I have heard that 50 to 70% of students get placed every year in my branch, which is the IT B.Tech. The highest on-campus package, which I heard was 31 LPA, and the average was 5 LPA, which probably means off-campus was much more. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. It's not the best, but average. If you have skills and a decent GPA above 7, you can easily get placed in good companies. An internship is offered in the last year, I guess, as well.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi doesn't work at all. You need to get its password, which is hardly possible. The network doesn't work at all. This college has a library of its own and has all the labs, good classrooms, and smart classes as well. It also has a lift for disabled people and teachers. There is no hostel of its own, but you can see one. Other than that, it does have its canteen and a café near the canteen. It has a stationery and juice shop. It has a photocopy and printout facility. Lab manuals are available in stationery. The library offers many books, including course books, but you should first get your library card.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

admission_overview.title: DAVV Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: DAVV admission 2025 is both entrance and merit-based. Most courses Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV University) offer entrance-based admission, such as PGDM and BTech. For BA, BBA, and BCom courses, admission is merit-based. It provides diploma certificates, PG diplomas, and UG, PG, and PhD level courses in streams such as Engineering, Computer Science, Management, Science, Arts and Humanities, Law, Languages, Music, and more. Admission to UG and PG programmes in DAVV University is based on CUET.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA admission at DAVV University?
faqs.answer: To get into the MBA programme at DAVV University, you need to have finished Class 12 and a graduation with at least 45 to 50 percent marks. Admission is done through entrance exams such as CMAT and CUET-PG. You also need to fill out the application on the DAVV University website. The eligibility criteria might be a little different depending on your category or the specialisation you're interested in.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for MBA at DAVV University?
faqs.answer: DAVV University accepts scores from the CMAT and CUET-PG exams for MBA admissions. These exams are required for anyone applying to the programme. Getting higher marks in these exams can increase your chance of getting selected during the counseling process. In addition, you also need to complete the application process on DAVV's own website.

faqs.question: Can I get into DAVV with 70 percentile in MPMET?
faqs.answer: No, candidates won't be able to get admission at DAVV with mere 70 percentile. This is because, as per theDAVV MPPET cutoff 2024for CAT stood at80for Lal Bahadur Shastri Institute of Technology and Management. So,  70 percentile is quite less than the cutoff percentile required to get admission for MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of DAVV for 2024 admission?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech and B.E. courses is based on the MP BE scores, with closing ranks stood between39760and142058for the General AI category candidates. For General Home State category candidates, the cutoff ranged from58793to157297. To be specific,B.E. in Computer Science and Engineeringclosed at a rank of 58793, whereasB.E. in Civil Engineeringsaw its closing rank at 157297. For aformentioned courses, CSE stand out as the most competitive and Civil Engineering stand out as the least competitive

courses_data.description: DAVV University in Indore provides full-time BTech courses that last for four years. To get admitted, students need to perform well in entrance exams such as JEE Main and then attend counselling organised by DTE, Bhopal. Students must have finished their Class 12 education with a minimum of 45 to 50 per cent marks. The programme includes several different engineering fields for students who want to pursue a career in Engineering.

faqs.question: How to get admission to BTech at DAVV?
faqs.answer: DAVVoffers BE/BTech courses to students in full-time mode only. The final admission process shall take place through the counselling conducted by DTE, Bhopal. The accepted entrance exams for BTech is JEE Main, CUET, MP BE, and others. Students must check theJEE Main exam pattern,JEE Main preparation guidelines, and thebest books for JEE Main preparation.Candidates must apply online on the official website by following a step-by-step application procedure. The first step in the application proces

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for BTech at DAVV University?
faqs.answer: DAVV University accepts scores from JEE Main and MPPET for admission into BTech programmes. These exams are required for getting a seat through DTE counselling. Students need to register for these exams individually.

faqs.question: Does DAVV require CUET?
faqs.answer: Admission into DAVV Indore for the year 2025 is based on the CUET exam.  NTA is expected to release the CUET PG 2024 Application Form in the 1st week of January 2025. Admission into various programmes such as BVoc, MPharm, MVoc, and Diploma programmes does not require taking the CUET exam.

faqs.question: Can a student get admission to DAVV without CUET?
faqs.answer: Admission withoutCUET (Common University Entrance Test)is possible for some courses only like LL. M., and others. but for these courses,CUET-PGis accepted by the university. So, students can get admission without CUET but the student have to change the course they are opting for. So, the best solution is to prepare in advance for theCUETand get admission in the relevant course. Seats are limited and candidates applying through CUET are many. Only good preparation can assist in getting admission to various courses likeBTech,BSc, B.A. and others.

placement_report.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: DAVV Indore Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: DAVV Indore placements 2024 is ongoing. According to media reports, a total of 16 companies have visited the campus and 150 students have secured jobs during the on-going DAVV Indore placements 2024. Further, students from MCA and BE have got outstanding placements during placements 2024 drive. The highest and average package recorded in 2024 was INR 24 LPA and INR 8.7 LPA . The median package offered during BTech placements 2023 was INR 6.5 LPA. MBA median package in 2023 stood at INR 5.75 LPA. BTech and MBA median package are as per the NIRF report 2024.

The highest package offered in 2023 was INR 113 LPA while the average package stood at INR 6.32 LPA . Further, a total of 1,408 offers and 1,022 unique offers were made during DAVV placements 2023. Apart from this, a total of 105 companies visited the campus during DAVV Indore placements 2023. The top recruiters of DAVV Indore in 2023 included Accenture, Cognizant and Amazon.

faqs.answer: DAVV Indore offers three years BSc undergraduate programme. description: DAVV cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the DAVV JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

DAVV cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 56342 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 52729.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 56342.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

DAVV offers MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery through NEET scores for home-state admissions. Candidates seeking admission to the DAVV MBBS course must have a valid score in NEET to be eligible for a further round of admissions.
