reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College, IndoreReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good in comparison to other Madhya Pradesh government medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has most of the things found in the best medical colleges. Our college has a large building area, and above-average facilities are available. The quality of food is also good, provided for 2200 Rs. Our canteen is not that great, and the sports area is also average, with all facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College facilities are not that good when compared to their fees and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure of the college can be better and more presentable according to its fee. In my opinion, the quality of food is not good, but they can improve it. Sports competitions are held in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and placement, as heard by me, but I have not experienced the placement part.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi doesn't work at all. You need to get its password, which is hardly possible. The network doesn't work at all. This college has a library of its own and has all the labs, good classrooms, and smart classes as well. It also has a lift for disabled people and teachers. There is no hostel of its own, but you can see one. Other than that, it does have its canteen and a café near the canteen. It has a stationery and juice shop. It has a photocopy and printout facility. Lab manuals are available ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: DAVV Indore is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chameli Devi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college environment with decent fees.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college is good, with well-built buildings constructed, and a good atmosphere, all greenery is present. Wi-Fi labs and libraries are well-managed. Classrooms a are decent. Hostel facility available for the students. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate. Mess and canteen football decent. You can play sports and games in your free time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good government college, campus crowd with decent marks.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, but it is far away from the main Indore city. Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries are present. Classrooms are decent. Girls' and boys' hostels are available in this college for the students. The taste of the hostel food is very decent. Canteen food is good. Sports and games you can play in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Indore and it is run by RGPV University.
reviews.review_text: There is no internet in the college and there is no hostel. The canteen is also average and the food there is also average. There is a Wi-Fi facility but it is not for the students, only for the faculty. Campus B is average, not very big, it is normal.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Indore Institute of LawReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: About law, learning, and growth.
reviews.review_text: The department is equipped with Wi-Fi enabled classrooms, modern lecture halls, and seminar rooms. A well-stocked library is available with both physical and digital resources. The environment supports academic as well as practical training. Hostel, mess, medical supports, and sports facilities are clean, secure, and well-maintained. The mess and canteen offer hygiene and decent quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college.  I have no idea about sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Acropolis Institute of Management Studies and ResearchReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure, learning environment, campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are excellent. Classrooms are well-managed and clean, including whiteboards and projectors. A central library is there with relevant books for courses. Wi-Fi facility is available, and computer labs for different departments with science labs are also there. Along with 2 canteens with a variety of food items.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acropolis Institute of Technology and ResearchReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for studies and placement with low JEE marks.
reviews.review_text: A college campus with modern infrastructure, Wi-Fi, labs, and a central library is available for the students. Girls' and boys' hostels are available in the college for the students. Mess food is acceptable, not too good, and canteen food is good. A games tournament happens in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila CampusReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & ManagementReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you want a design college with low fees, this college is suitable.
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure. The campus is 10 km away from the main city. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Labs and a central library are available. Hostel facility is not available in this college. Canteen food is very average.

college_info.intro:
DIT University popular programmes are BTech, BPharma & BSc. DIT University Computer Science, Computational Science, and Mechanical Engineering are one of the topmost selected courses at the university. DIT Uttarakhand BTech students are placed in top companies in top sectors such as Palo Alto Network, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, KPMG, IBM, Optum, and others. DIT University Dehradun BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or take up various jobs relevant to their stream. The university students are skilled in Microsoft Excel, Python (Programming Language), Java, etc. As per the placement data released by the university, the highest package offered to students is INR 44 LPA (BTech CSE).
The BTech CSE course is provided in the following specialisations:
DIT University BSc students are placed in top companies in top sectors. DIT University Uttarakhand BSc students are taught to apply the scientific knowledge of Physics and to help understand various aspects of nature. They are also taught to formulate, identify, and analyse scientific problems and hence reach justified conclusions using various principles of basic and applied sciences. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by DIT University and their respective eligibility and DIT Dehradun fees:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report,  over 350 recruiters participated in the placement process 2023 at DIT University and presented over 1,350 job offers to the students of Class 2023. The the highest package package offered during DIT University placements in 2023 stood at INR 58 LPA. The top recruiters of DIT University Dehradun in 2023 included Palo Alto Network,   Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, KPMG, IBM, Optum, Commvault, etc.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered in DIT Dehradun?

faqs.answer: A:    DIT University has released the mean package for the year 2024. The overall mean package in 2024 was 5.76 LPA. Also, the mean package recorded during SOET, SOC, School of Management and School of Pharmacy was 4.2 LPA, 6.26 LPA, 4.5 LPA and 3.2 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average package offered during the recent DIT University Dehradun placements?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 415 offers were made during DIT University placement 2024. It was 817 and 1251 in 2023 and 2022. The placement rate in 2024 was 64.18% whereas it was 89.01% and 95% in previous two years. The highest package offered in 2024 and 2023 was 44 LPA and 58 LPA.
faqs.question: What are the year-wise placement records at DIT University?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 198 companies visited the campus in 2024 whereas in 2023 and 2022, the number was 270 and 201.
faqs.question: How many recruiters participated during the recent DIT University placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Students who wish to get DIT University course admissions must take part in the DIT University application process before the last date of application. Students must know their DIT University eligibility criteria & apply accordingly. At the UG level, Dehradun Institute of Technology has BTech, BSc, BTech, B.Arch, etc courses for students. BTech is provided in specialisations like Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. DIT University Dehradun offers MBA, MCA, etc courses at the PG level. Below mentioned are some of the DIT University courses & their respective eligibility & structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can apply for government jobs after BSc from DIT University. There are various career options for BSc graduates based on the chosen specialisation. A bachelor's degree in Science can be used for different jobs in the public sector that are a good fit for the candidate's technical knowledge and analytical skills. BSc degree holders can also apply for research positions at national institutes and laboratories.  Some of the top job profiles for BSc graduates of DIT University are:Research ScientistClinical Research SpecialistRBI Grade B OfficerLab TechnicianAssistant NurseSBI PO
faqs.question: Am I eligible for government jobs after BSc from DIT University?

faqs.answer: A:    DIT Dehradun University offers BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BDes courses at the UG and PG levels. The college also offers three years of BTech and BPharma Lateral Entry courses. Students can check some of the course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:Course NameEligibility CriteriaBTechClass 12 with 4 subjects-Physics, Mathematics, English and best one of the remaining subjects with at least 50%-60% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12MBAGraduation with 50% aggregateMCAGraduate (e.g. BE/BTech/BSC/Bcom/BA/BVoc/BCA/BBA etc.) with 50% aggregate preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 level or at graduation levelMTechBE/ BTech in relevant specialisations with at least 55% aggregateMPharmBPharm with at least 55% aggregateBCAClass 12 with Mathematics or its equivalent examination in any stream with at least 50% aggregate

faqs.answer: A:    DIT University, Dehradun, MCA programme total tuition fee ranges between INR 2.7 Lacs and INR 3 lakh. The total course fee shall include more components. It must be noted that the mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. Hence, is subject to changes.
faqs.question: How much is the fee for MCA programme at DIT University, Dehradun?

faqs.answer: A:    DIT University BSc fee is cumulative of multiple components that are charged one-time or annually/semesterly. Some of the components included in the fee are tuition fee, library deposit, training and placement fee, and more. After final selections, some amount of fee has to be paid for seat confirmation. The below table can be referred for the fee details:Course NameOne-Time FeeTuition FeeHostel FeeBScINR 15,000INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 6.5 lakhINR 1.13 Lacs - INR 5.5 lakhIt must be noted that the mentioned fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. review_content.Placements: Nearly 72-75 percent of BCA students got internships through college or personal efforts. Recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, Teach Mahindra, Deloitte, etc. Hire the students. The major roles of BCA graduates were software developers, web developers, system analysts, technical support engineers, database administrators, and IT consultants.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi everywhere. Computer labs are modern and well-equipped. Classrooms are clean and have smart boards. Library is big, peaceful, and has digital resources. There is a good environment for studying and projects. Hostels are clean and safe with Wi-Fi. Rooms available in single, double, and triple sharing. There is 24/7 security and warden support.

faqs.answer: Candidate can check the detailed steps from the points mentioned below:Step 1: Online ApplicationAspirants need to apply online for the respective course Candidates need to pay an application fee to apply for admission.Step 2: Selection RoundsDIT University will shortlist candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. DIT also conducts DUET for shortlisting aspirants for MPharm, M.Tech and PhD courses. Candidates also have to undergo counselling for a few courses. However, for PhD who have a valid score GATE / SET / SLET will be selected based on PI. Additionally, candidates who do not have any of the scores mentioned above need to sit and appear for merit-based counselling on DUET followed by PI.Step 3: Counselling, Document Verification & Final AdmissionCandidates are called for the counselling round and document verification, post selections.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission procedure to get into DIT University, Dehradun?

faqs.answer: The university shortlists candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. DIT University Dehradun also conducts DUET for shortlisting aspirants for MPharm, M.Tech and PhD courses. The university conducts other selection rounds like GDPI or PI rounds for some of the specific courses. However, for PhD who have a valid score GATE / SET / SLET will be selected based on PI. course_faqs.answer: Yes, DIT University offers a two-year MBA programme. The course is divided into four semesters. DIT admit applicants based on scores of MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/UKSEE/DUET. Shortlisted candidates also have to go through group discussion and personal interview rounds. The university offers MBA (general) and MBA in FINTECH. The aspirants who fulfil the eligibility requirements can apply on the universitys' official website.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech in DIT?
overview_faqs.answer: The university total fee is cumulative of multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. Candidates have to pay some amount of the total fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation. overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel withdrawal refund guidelines at DIT University?
overview_faqs.answer: To withdrawal the application from the hostel, candidates are required to submit their request to the administration department. If the student withdraws before the notified date of commencement of classes/reporting for hostel, only Rs. 1,000/- will be deducted as processing charges and balance shall be refunded. If the student has availed hostel facility even for one day in a calendar month, then Mess & Laundry fee for that calendar month shall be deducted.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy for new admission at DIT University?
overview_faqs.answer: In DIT University, Registration fee of INR 1,250 and Admission Fee of INR 10,000 fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. All withdrawal applications will be processed by the Registrar Office of DIT University on recommendations of the Head, Admissions. Further, In case, the student reports to attend the Programme and subsequently applies for withdrawal, an additional amount of Rs 10,000/- on account of Joining Kit will be deducted over and above from the refundable amount as mentioned in the table provided above. review_summary.college_name: DIT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of the BCA course at DIT University, Dehradun.

content.Placements: I am from the BCA batch at DIT University, Dehradun. In our course, around 70-80 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered ranges from 10-12 LPA. The average package ranges between 3-5 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2-3 LPA. Many well-known companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, HCL, and Deloitte visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course is good. The campus has full Wi-Fi. It has well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a large library with digital resources. The hostel facilities are decent and safe. The mess food is average but manageable. The canteen offers a greater variety of food. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports grounds and indoor games are also provided. Overall, the infrastructure supports the sports academy and students' lives.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Analytics) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: DIT University offers a well-structured curriculum.

content.Placements: Around 90 percent of students are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered to our batch is between 30 LPA-35 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5 LPA. The major roles offered to students included Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Web Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the B.Tech course at DIT University is impressive and well-maintained. The department provides high-speed Wi-Fi across the academic clock, well-equipped computer labs, modern classrooms with projectors, and a library that has a strong collection of technical books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My experience as a BCA student at DIT University.

content.Placements: Nearly 72-75 percent of BCA students got internships through college or personal efforts. Recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, Teach Mahindra, Deloitte, etc. Hire the students. The major roles of BCA graduates were software developers, web developers, system analysts, technical support engineers, database administrators, and IT consultants.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi everywhere. Computer labs are modern and well-equipped. Classrooms are clean and have smart boards. Library is big, peaceful, and has digital resources. There is a good environment for studying and projects. Hostels are clean and safe with Wi-Fi. Rooms available in single, double, and triple sharing. There is 24/7 security and warden support.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Robotics) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great college according to the environment, exposure and fests.

content.Placements: Almost 70 per cent of students who are enrolled in B.Tech are placed from DIT. Overall, it is good that the highest package offered on campus is 44 LPA and the lowest is 3LPA. On average, it is quite decent and top recruiting companies are Infosys, IBM, TCS, Amazon and lots more. For an internship, they do not provide much exposure.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good, classrooms are well-equipped, Wi-Fi connectivity is slow, however, the library is good with all course books available and labs are well maintained. Physics labs are provided with all the setup and equipment, and computer labs have good connectivity of Wi-Fi, hence no issues with Wi-Fi while using computers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Robotics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: DIT University is one of the top universities in Uttarakhand for B.Tech CSE.

content.Placements: DIT University offers a placement record of more than 95% students. The highest Package was 58 LPA by Palo Alto Networks. Average package offered was 7.8 LPA by DIT University. The top Recruiting companies of B.Tech CSE in DIT are Harness. Palo alto Network, Infosys, KPMG, Accenture, etc. Around 80% students got internships in DIT from esteemed companies.
content.Infrastructure: DIT University has a campus of 24 acres and provides various facilities like high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped and advanced labs, technology-advanced and ICT-enabled classrooms. The Hostel facility provided by DIT offers clean and hygienic mess food, a well-equipped gym with a qualified trainer, indoor and outdoor sports facilities, various club activities, 24/7 medical assistance, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: DIT University Course Admissions 2026 (Open): Eligibility, Fees, Application, Selection

admission_overview.title: DIT University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DIT University admission 2026 is open for all courses. DIT Dehradun offers a number of courses such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, MTech, etc. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based admission as per preferred course. UG courses extend upto three years with PG courses extending upto 2 years. To get admitted to the university, candidates must meet the minimum eligibility criteria. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. Check the official website to know details about the duration of PhD courses offered at DIT Dehradun. Application process at DIT University is conducted strictly in the online mode and can be completed through teh official website. Read the article to know more about DIT University course admission. eligibility, application, scholarships etc.

The university offers direct admissions for BTech courses for Class 12 state board toppers. However, the university offers courses in the streams of Animation, Design, Engineering, Science etc. The table below showcases some of the DIT University course admissions: Class 12 with 4 subjects-Physics, Mathematics, English and best one of the remaining subjects with at least 50%-60% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12

admission_process.title: DIT Dehradun University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission process at DIT University is a multi-step process. Check below the admission steps forDIT University Dehradun:
To know more about DIT University Course Fee and Admission Process, check the below video:
lists: Application Process:The mode of application is online for all courses. Candidates need to pay an application fee to apply for admission.

Selection Rounds:The university shortlists candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. DIT University Dehradun also conducts DUET for shortlisting aspirants for MPharm, M.Tech and PhD courses. The university conducts other selection rounds like GDPI or PI rounds for some of the specific courses. However, for PhD who have a valid score GATE / SET / SLET will be selected based on PI. In addition, candidates who do not have any of the scores mentioned above need to sit and appear for merit-based counselling on DUET followed by PI.

Seat Confirmation:After the completion of the selection rounds, candidates are called for merit-based counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

courses_data.name: DIT University BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: DIT University offers a BTech course for a four-year duration. The courses are offered in a number of specialisations. Admission to Btech at the university is strictly entrance based. Students can get into this course based on a valid score in JEE Main exam. Check out the following information to know the eligibility and selection criteria forDIT University BTechis mentioned in the points below:

faqs.question: How to get admission in DIT University for BTech?
faqs.answer: DIT University BTech is a four-year course divided into eight semesters at the UG level. The UG-level course is offered across different specialisations. The university admits candidates to the BTech courses based on JEE scores/merit in Class 12.Some of the specialisations in which the course is offered are Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology,  Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech courses.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech course at DIT University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BTech course is based on the JEE Main score or Class 12 marks. After completion of the selection rounds, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. It also offers direct admission to the Class 12 toppers (10% seats). Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.Apart from this, the selection criteria for BTech Lateral Entry

faqs.question: Does DIT University offer BTech (LE)?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech Lateral Entry course is available at DIT University. BTech (LE) and BTech Core (LE) are a three-year courses offered at the UG level. A pass in Diploma in Engineering or BSc with at least 50% aggregate is required to apply for the BTech (LE) courses. Admission will be based on merit in the last qualifying exam for BTech courses.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for DIT University BTech CSE after scholarship?
faqs.answer: DIT University provides Merit-Based Scholarship to students pursuing BTech CSE programme. Below is the fee calculator for BTech CSE after receiving the scholarship:CriteriaFirst-Year Tuition FeeFee after ScholarshipEqual or greater than 90% or 1st Rank Holders of all Boards/ JEE Rank between1-50,000INR 2.14 lakh40%-INR 1.28 lakhEqual or greater than 75% to < 90%/JEE Rank Between50,001-80,000INR 2.14 lakh30%-INR 1.50 lakhEqual or greater than 60% to < 75%/JEE Rank Between 80,001-1,00,000INR 2.14

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA course at DIT University?
faqs.answer: The selection to MBA course is based on MAT/ XAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ UKSEE. Candidates who have not appeared for any of the entrance exam can appear for DUET conducted by the university. The shortlisted aspirants need to come for GDPI round. After completion of the selection rounds, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their se

faqs.question: How many seats are reserved for MBA at DIT University?
faqs.answer: There are a total of60 seatsfor the MBA programme at the DIT University. The university allot seats based on merit in the accepted entrance exams: MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/UKSEE/DUET. Candidates performance in the group discussion and personal interview round also plays a crucial round during selections. It must be noted that the given seat count is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered in DIT Dehradun?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report,  over 350 recruiters participated in the placement process 2023 at DIT University and presented over 1,350 job offers to the students of Class 2023. The the highest package package offered during DIT University placements in 2023 stood at INR 58 LPA. The top recruiters of DIT University Dehradun in 2023 included Palo Alto Network,   Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, KPMG, IBM, Optum, Commvault, etc.

faqs.question: How much percentile is required for DIT University?
faqs.answer: DIT Dehradun University offers BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BDes courses at the UG and PG levels. The college also offers three years of BTech and BPharma Lateral Entry courses. Students can check some of the course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:Course NameEligibility CriteriaBTechClass 12 with 4 subjects-Physics, Mathematics, English and best one of the remaining subjects with at least 50%-60% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12MBAGraduation with 50% aggregateMCAGraduate (e.g. BE/BTech/BSC/Bcom/BA/BVoc/BCA/BBA etc.) with 50% aggregate preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 level or at graduation levelMTechBE/ BTech in relevant specialisations with at least 55% aggregateMPharmBPharm with at least 55% aggregateBCAClass 12 with Mathematics or its equivalent examination in any stream with at least 50% aggregate

faqs.question: Is DIT University admission open for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, DIT University MBA registration is currently active on the official website. Candidates can apply online at the university website. Aspirants should enter all the details carefully in the admission form. The details to be filled out in the registration form are:NameEmail addressMobile numberProgramme levelType and courseState and city

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in DIT University Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Under certain circumstances, direct admission is really available from DIT University in Dehradun. The institution offers this chance to deserving students or applicants who scored more than 95% in the Science stream on the 12th board exam. Additionally, students seeking admission based on merit from qualifying exams, NRIs, and class 12 toppers can apply for direct admissions.

The average package stood at INR 5.76 LPA. A total of 198 companies visited the campus in 2025 and prsented 415 job offers to the batch 2024. Some of the top recruiters of DIT University included Harness, Juspay and Cradlepoint .
The students of the BTech CSE batch 2024 secured the highest package of INR 44 LPA . The students of the ECE and EE batch 2024 seured the highest salary of INR 7.25 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fees of DIT University for DPharm?
faqs.answer: DIT University DPharm fee is inclusive of various components, such as caution money, hostel fee, tuition fee, and more. Some of the fee components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually/semesterly. DIT DPharm tuition fee is INR 1.6 lakh and the hostel fee is INR 1.13 lakh . Students have to pay some amount of the total fee for seat confirmation. It must be noted that the given fee details are as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy for new admission at DIT University?
faqs.answer: In DIT University, Registration fee of INR 1,250 and Admission Fee of INR 10,000 fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. All withdrawal applications will be processed by the Registrar Office of DIT University on recommendations of the Head, Admissions. Further, In case, the student reports to attend the Programme and subsequently applies for withdrawal, an additional amount of Rs 10,000/- on account of Joining Kit will be deducted over and above from the refundable amount as mentioned in the table provided above. Given below are Percentage of Refund of Academic Fee, along with criteria: S.No Percentage of Refund of Academic Fee* Point of time when notice of withdrawal of admission is received by the University 1 100% 15 days or more before the formally-notified last date of admission 2 90% Less than 15 days before the formally-notified last date of admission 3 80% 15 days or less after the formally-notified last date of admission 4 50% More than 15 days but less than 30 days after formally-notified last date of admission 5 0% More than 30 days after formally notified last date of admission *Academic fee consists of Annual Tuition Fee and Academic Services Fee spread over Semester/s only.

DIT University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for DIT University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. hostel_campus.college_name: DIT University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel accommodation comprises of American style apartments which are well furnished, hygienic and have ultramodern amenities. Each apartment has three rooms shared by two students each, a lobby and attached bathrooms. The hostel premises has common TV room, tuck-shops (having stationary, barber, bakery, juice etc. shops) and state of the art indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The entire hostel premises are Wi-Fi enabled and has a separate computer centre with 24X7 internet facility. There are four in-campus boys' hostel viz. Raman, Bose, Bhabha and Sarabhai with a total capacity of accommodating around 1,200 boys. University also has a separate in-campus Girls’ Hostels viz. Sarojini Girls’ Hostel which can accommodate around 900 girl students. Students can also watch their favourite TV Channels on numerous TVs with DTH connections which are available in all the hostels. All hostel blocks are equipped with solar water heaters with heating elements which provide warm water in the hostels all year round.

library.description: Centrally air-conditioned library equipped with all Indian and foreign author books and over 1 Lakh books, over 3500 CDs/DVDs, subscribes to more than 202 journals/magazines in print and subscribes to more than 5000 e-journals

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball, Table Tennis

library.description: Centrally air-conditioned library equipped with all Indian and foreign author books and over 1 Lakh books, over 3500 CDs/DVDs, subscribes to more than 202 journals/magazines in print and subscribes to more than 5000 e-journals

cafeteria.description: DIT University adopts special measures to ensure that the students are provided with healthy and hygienic food. There are 3 cafeterias in different blocks of the campus. The cafeterias and other eateries are functioning based on the ‘Pay As You Eat Concept’ like CCD. DIT University provides a student with all the amenities and facilities to enjoy the metro lifestyle right within the campus.

hostel.description: The hostel accommodation comprises of American style apartments which are well furnished, hygienic and have ultramodern amenities. Each apartment has three rooms shared by two students each, a lobby and attached bathrooms. The hostel premises has common TV room, tuck-shops (having stationary, barber, bakery, juice etc. shops) and state of the art indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The entire hostel premises are Wi-Fi enabled and has a separate computer centre with 24X7 internet facility. There are four in-campus boys' hostel viz. Raman, Bose, Bhabha and Sarabhai with a total capacity of accommodating around 1,200 boys. University also has a separate in-campus Girls’ Hostels viz. Sarojini Girls’ Hostel which can accommodate around 900 girl students. Students can also watch their favourite TV Channels on numerous TVs with DTH connections which are available in all the hostels. All hostel blocks are equipped with solar water heaters with heating elements which provide warm water in the hostels all year round.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Design Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of the BCA course at DIT University, Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is good. The campus has full Wi-Fi. It has well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a large library with digital resources. The hostel facilities are decent and safe. The mess food is average but manageable. The canteen offers a greater variety of food. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports grounds and indoor games are also provided. Overall, the infrastructure supports the sports academy and students' lives.

reviews.review_heading: DIT University offers a well-structured curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the B.Tech course at DIT University is impressive and well-maintained. The department provides high-speed Wi-Fi across the academic clock, well-equipped computer labs, modern classrooms with projectors, and a library that has a strong collection of technical books.

reviews.review_heading: My experience as a BCA student at DIT University.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi everywhere. Computer labs are modern and well-equipped. Classrooms are clean and have smart boards. Library is big, peaceful, and has digital resources. There is a good environment for studying and projects. Hostels are clean and safe with Wi-Fi. Rooms available in single, double, and triple sharing. There is 24/7 security and warden support.

reviews.review_heading: Great college according to the environment, exposure and fests.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good, classrooms are well-equipped, Wi-Fi connectivity is slow, however, the library is good with all course books available and labs are well maintained. Physics labs are provided with all the setup and equipment, and computer labs have good connectivity of Wi-Fi, hence no issues with Wi-Fi while using computers.

reviews.review_heading: DIT University is one of the top universities in Uttarakhand for B.Tech CSE.
reviews.review_text: DIT University has a campus of 24 acres and provides various facilities like high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped and advanced labs, technology-advanced and ICT-enabled classrooms. The Hostel facility provided by DIT offers clean and hygienic mess food, a well-equipped gym with a qualified trainer, indoor and outdoor sports facilities, various club activities,  24/7 medical assistance, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointing if you're looking for an OG college regarding placement.
reviews.review_text: Most of the facilities that you can think of are available. The Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are pretty good. The architecture is nice, and the nature around the campus is breathtaking (reconfirming to you that it's all about nature, not the "packages"). The mess serves okay food, and canteens are available and serve pretty well. There are medical facilities not specifically targeted at sports, but yes, they exist—not at a bigger level, but it's fine.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with strong faculty members and decent placement. Overall, a great experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The mess food is also very good. Wi-Fi is also available 24X7. The library has a good collection of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: DIT Institute of Technology, Uttarakhand, is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: DIT University in Dehradun offers a high-quality infrastructure and facilities, including well-maintained Wi-Fi-enabled spaces, libraries, labs, a hostel, a rooftop, and a sports ground. Hostel has A1 facilities, including a mess and common areas. College has both girls' and boys' hostel. College also has A1 quality facilities available to solve each and every doubt of students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a beautiful campus. Overall, it is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here at DIT University infrastructure is good. The location is brilliant. Classrooms are good and labs are excellent. It has decent hotels. It has a nice, clean, clear, and beautiful campus as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great university situated in the foothills of Mussoorie.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere, though it doesn’t always work well. The library is grand, and all required books are available; it is also air-conditioned. Classrooms can feel very hot during the summer. The hostel is decent, though it can feel suffocating; the food is not that great. It’s neither hygienic nor tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of both classes and hostels is very nice. Classrooms and labs are spacious and have good working space. The hostel rooms are well-ventilated, managed, and clean. Facilities provided in the hostel are drinking water, 4 times meals in a mess, and a confectionery shop for emergency uses. Medical facilities are common for the college and hostel, and they are well-managed. Hostels have playgrounds, a court, and gym facilities too. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: College of activities and exploration.
reviews.review_text: There are over 350 ICT-enabled classrooms and more than 80 state-of-the-art laboratories. The VEDA library spans 2500 square feet and boasts over 1400 computers. It also features a 500-seat air-conditioned room. The hostel can accommodate 1200 boys and 1000 girls. The campus features multiple cafeterias.

reviews.review_heading: Solid infrastructure and decent academics.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, and the infrastructure is good. The library is good, but there is a problem, it's not open 24 hours. But during exam time, it is open until 3 o'clock at night. The Wi-Fi is not so good. The classrooms are big and good, but the mess food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest that this college has good infrastructure and facilities. Thank you.
reviews.review_text: Our college includes good Wi-Fi and labs such as the computer lab, chemistry lab, physics lab, and biology lab for nursing students. The library is also very good, with many useful books. The quality of the mess food is good, and there are facilities for doctors, sports, games, and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There is completely established Wi-Fi throughout the campus.

college_info.intro:
Among the different courses offered at Amity University Gurgaon (Amity GGN) a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the university being:
The university extends these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Also, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. These programmes cover a range of topics from Managerial Topics to the latest technological advacements and are highly sought-after for their career prospects after graduation with students receiving high packages at top companies.
The BTech and MBA programmes are highly sought-after among students for their placements and career prospects. BTech graduates of Amity Gurugram are value in technical roles while the MBA graduates are better suited for leadership and managerial positions. Further, MTech at Amity Gurugram is suitable for students who wish to go for higher studies in their chosen field and are well-developed for advanced roles such as Research, Consultancy, Teaching Graduates, etc.
The curriculum for these Amity Gurugram courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the other popular programmes offered at Amity University Gurugram Haryana in the table provided below:

reviews_list.review_title: Amity University Gurgaon B.Tech CSE review.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from Amity University, Haryana. In our current batch 2025, many students who appeared for placement have relevant skills get placed in their placement session. The highest package is around 15 LPA above, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Yamaha, and many startups. Role offered is software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Amity University is considered as a good university for studies.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placed in this course. The average salary is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, and Narayana are the recruiting hospitals. 100% of students got internships from our course at Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, Narayana, etc. Top role offered in our course is nursing officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are available. Infrastructure is very good. Facilities in hostel and course are good including food of the best quality. Medical facilities are available with doctors and nurses. We have good sports ground and different games.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth doing MBA at Amity Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity Noida can be a decent choice to pursue a PG-level Management course. The university offers MBA across 27 specialisations. It also offers international opportunities to its students, where a five-week Study Abroad Program runs at Amity Campuses in London, Dubai, New York or Singapore. Amity University Noida has been ranked continuously for its Management category courses by NIRF. review_summary.college_name: Amity University Gurugram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placement is good enough. High reputed companies placement opportunities. More than 300+ companies including MNCs visited us last year for recruiting us. The average salary package offered is 5.0 LPA, and the highest last year is 17 LPA, which is a good number. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Infosys, Mahindra, Accenture, TCS, Byju's, and HDFC Bank visited our campus for placements. Software engineer role is offered to the students. Nearly 70 percent of students got an internship in different companies. Different levels of interviews and tests on skill-based packages are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) Honours/Research - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amity University, Gurugram.

content.Placements: 45% placement with 15-30 Lacs pachage. 98% student passed the college. In amity the highest package was 67 Lacs and the lowest package was 20 Lacs. Ghe top recruiting companies for my course was google and more. 69% student got internship from my course in google and more big companies .
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are in very good condition. Very good facilities and infrastructure are available for your course and department; for example, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are all very good. The quality of the facilities in hostels is very good. The quality of food is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amity University Gurgaon B.Tech CSE review.

content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from Amity University, Haryana. In our current batch 2025, many students who appeared for placement have relevant skills get placed in their placement session. The highest package is around 15 LPA above, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, TCS, Yamaha, and many startups. Role offered is software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amity University is considered as a good university for studies.

content.Placements: 100% of students got placed in this course. The average salary is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, and Narayana are the recruiting hospitals. 100% of students got internships from our course at Medanta, Fortis, Gangaram, Narayana, etc. Top role offered in our course is nursing officer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are available. Infrastructure is very good. Facilities in hostel and course are good including food of the best quality. Medical facilities are available with doctors and nurses. We have good sports ground and different games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing procedures and life-size equipments to get a thorough knowledge of nursing.

content.Placements: Approximately 80-85% of the students are placed in my senior year while they are still attending classes, and with a very decent and respectful package. Recruiting companies like Medanta, Fortis, Paras, and Sri Gangaram Hospital. We have a 6-month internship in the last semester in a community setting at Medanta and Civil Hospital, Gurugram. Top roles offered are staff nurse, operation theatre nurse, and availability to higher courses.
content.Infrastructure: We have atleast 4-5 different labs catering to each department and having human size models, dummies, and equipments. All the procedures and equipments to perform and practice for the future. Our hostel is a very safe and secure place having sets of 2 beds in each room, 6 students in each suite. For food, we have at least 7 different places with amazing food and a way to connect to people. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports events and cultural fests happen twice a year.

admission_process.title: Amity University Gurugram Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amity University Gurgaon admission is a multi-step process. Candidates seeking for getting admission to various courses of the university must apply at the official website. To admit the right candidates, the university selects students based on selection criteria, which include filling out the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and paying for the Amity University Gurugram fees at the time of final admission.
Step 1: Amity University Gurgaon Application Process 2025

Students must fill out an application form on the official admission website of Amity University Gurugram (https://portal.amity.edu/NewOnlineForm/Candidate/SignUp). With candidates needing to fill out a separate form in case of multiple course by paying an application fee ofINR 1,100for each form. The new users are required to generate login credentials and fill out an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Amity University Gurgaon.
Step 2: Amity University Gurgaon Selection Process

Amity University Gurgaon admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For most of the UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the Personal Interview round as per course requirements. The students are selected based on Amity PhD Entrance Test +Interview by Faculty Member or All India National Level Competitive Examination or NET (viz. UGC / CSIR -NET in Category 1,2 or 3, ICMR- JRF/SRF, ICAR-AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD),GATE, GPAT, DST – INSPIRE, DBT-JRF etc.
Step 3: Final Offer Letter

The final results are declared after the completion of all previous rounds. The information concerning selection will be communicated on the admission microsite as well as via Email and SMS. Selected candidates will get an admission letter along with important information such as semester fee, class commencement date, time, venue of the course, allotment of a hostel (If applied), scholarship (If any) and the list of documents required at the time of joining. Candidates also have to pay a certain amount as per theAmity University Gurugram feesstructure to secure their seats.

placement_report.college_name: Amity University Gurugram Placement 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Amity University Gurugram Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: During the Amity Gurugram placement drive 2025, in 422 companies visited in total. There were 147 fortune-500 companies and 275 national companies . The placement season 2025 welcomed 280 new recruiters .

As per the Amity Gurugram placement report, 430 recruiters participated and offered various job roles to the batch 2024 across sectors, such as E­-Commerce, BFSI, Consulting, Research , etc. Of all the total recruiters who participated in Amity University Gurgaon placements in 2024, 285 were new and 145 were repeated recruiters. The top recruiters of Amity University Gurgaon placements in 2024 included Amazon, Capgemini, Coforge, UNO Minda, PlanetSpark, etc. Further, according to Amity University Gurgaon Engineering NIRF report 2024, the median package offered to the BTech batch 2023 stood at INR 4.81 LPA.

nirf.description:
Amity University Gurugram has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Amity University Gurugram indicate the institute's strong performance in areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
The rankings of the institute in the 'University' category have displayed a decreasing trend when evaluated against previous year's rankings. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 7 ranks to #101-150 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 2 ranks to #101-150 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Gurugram fell 20 ranks to #101-15- rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Gurugram Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Amity University provides air-conditioned apartment-style accommodation facility for 2100 students. The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment.

The separate facilities for boys and girls, caring wardens and a tight security ensure a pleasant stay allowing students to focus on their academics. The air-conditioned residential apartment suites consist of 3 single rooms with an attached bathroom and sitting lounge equipped necessary furniture.
facilities: 20-acre sports complex (Tennis Court,  Cricket Field,  Football Ground,  Basketball court, etc.)

library.description:
Amity University library is an integrated knowledge resource centre that is stocked with approx 50,000 books, 20,000 journals and 2,500 publications. 

Amity students have access to Ebsco Host, UGC-Infonet, INDEST-AICTE, IS1 and Delnet. All Amity students are members of Amizone - Amity Intranet Zone which allows them easy access to these journals and papers.

These Libraries consist of Reference Sections, Circulation Sections, Audio-visual Sections, Periodical Sections and Digital Libraries.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash Court, Volleyball Court, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Course curriculum is pretty appropriate, especially for students belonging to an IT background. First two semesters covered the basics of languages like C, C+. Later we learned about some advanced languages like Java, HTML, etc. There re a lot of guest lectures and workshops which are frequently organized for knowledge. Hostel facility is available and also PGs are available near the college. The room offering is good with single as well as double sharing, and the price of separate rooms is high...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Gurugram.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are in very good condition. Very good facilities and infrastructure are available for your course and department; for example, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are all very good. The quality of the facilities in hostels is very good. The quality of food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University Gurgaon B.Tech CSE review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Amity is good with very calm environment. There are many active clubs and societies you and become part of those and explore yourself. You can also make a good connection here. There are only few places where you can get Wi-Fi. Library is one of them and college classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel is overall good with good facilities for hostel mess. There are 2 messes at Amity and many other outlets for food. Amity has a very big sports complex timing is 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM o...

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is considered as a good university for studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are available. Infrastructure is very good. Facilities in hostel and course are good including food of the best quality. Medical facilities are available with doctors and nurses. We have good sports ground and different games.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing procedures and life-size equipments to get a thorough knowledge of nursing.
reviews.review_text: We have atleast 4-5 different labs catering to each department and having human size models, dummies, and equipments. All the procedures and equipments to perform and practice for the future. Our hostel is a very safe and secure place having sets of 2 beds in each room, 6 students in each suite. For food, we have at least 7 different places with amazing food and a way to connect to people. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Sports events and cultural fests happen twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good and canteen food is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, classroom is ventilated, and AC is available. Number of options and variety are available. Classrooms and corridors are always clean. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. Air-conditioned classrooms are available. It provides proper uniforms for clinicals. It also provides laboratory facilities and training.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members. There are 99% placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college and hostel is amazing. It has availability of Wi-Fi. Hostel provides clean and quiet environment. Hostel also has medical facilities. We also have labs, library, and classroom. Quality of food is like home and great mess is there.

reviews.review_heading: Studying here always feels like learning something new every day.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college is very well. They provide good care to the students. Faculty members are very helpful to the students. The canteens are good and only veg and hygiene food is served. Library is also good and all new books are available.

reviews.review_heading: I feel proud as a student of Amity University Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Haryana has one of the best infrastructure, which is well-maintained in terms of lab classes, library facilities, and the list goes on. AC, non-AC rooms, water cooler, lift, study table, medical facilities, sports complex, playground, and mess food. These are some facilities which are provided to hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University provided what students needed the most.
reviews.review_text: The facility and the infrastructure are amazing. Classrooms, water facility, library, labs, and Wi-Fi facility are amazing and have all the equipment and books that are needed in the course, and every necessary thing required for the course. Hostel, if we talk about hostel, food is the first thing we have in our mind, and here the food is amazing, including other facilities too, good food quality, and medical facilities, everything is good here.

reviews.review_heading: "Great infrastructure and facilities with diverse student amenities."
reviews.review_text: The ASH department offers excellent infrastructure, including Wi-Fi-enabled campuses and modern classrooms. Hostels are comfortable, but sometimes the food isn't good, while sports facilities enhance the overall student experience, and the medical facilities are also not good in the university.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend others take admission here, especially if they are looking for hotel management.
reviews.review_text: Students who are interested in sports will find a decent sports complex at this university, and tournaments are held at specific times of the year. Hostels are also decent, with food quality being good and offering variations. Hostels also have recreational rooms.

reviews.review_heading: A balanced college with good opportunities and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is actually better than many universities. We have a front office lab, restaurant, kitchen, bakery lab, Wi-Fi, and a library everything. There are approximately 5-6 canteens, and they are very clean. The food is also very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The best private university in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: Clean and tidy classrooms with state-of-the-art infrastructure provide a smooth learning experience. The library is a very comfortable place to study. There are multiple cafeterias on the campus to chose from, offering a variety of meal options. A big sports complex includes sports such as tennis, basketball, badminton, football, volleyball, etc. A medical room is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm completely satisfied with Amity University Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Amity University Haryana is one of the best parts, where vibrant college life truly thrives. Our Amity School of Hospitality department is introduced with two new classrooms along with a new restaurant and kitchen. The hostel offers both AC and Non-AC rooms, along with two hostel messes and a food court.

reviews_list.review_title: A brief overview of the Government Doon Medical College.

review_content.Placements: 150 students got placed from the college at the time of my admission in 2024. Students are placed in the hospital that is affiliated with the college, and during internship, interns receive a stipend of Rs. 17,000 per month. Every student needs to do an internship in a hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Cambus is big and well supported with various facilities. Various facilities in different departments of the college are provided. There are 5 lecture halls and every department is well-equipped with Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are pretty good. There are 3-seater and 2-seater rooms available. College is well-equipped with a badminton court and various indoor sports facilities. Hostel food is good, healthy, and hygienic. Different food is provided on different days.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am completely satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not given in our course but in previous years, students who take the bond are placed in areas as medical officer. 100% of students got internships from our course. The top role is medical officer. The highest package is up to 1 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our classrooms are well-built. Classrooms have AC and fans. The quality of facilities provided in the hospital is also good. They have a big mess and a big kitchen. But the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is not good. Medical facilities are also provided in the hostel for emergencies. The sports facilities are also provided in the hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun, has amazing faculty members and a course curriculum.

content.Placements: We have a batch of 150 students per year in the Government Doon Medical College. Mostly, students at the end of the course give NEET PG exams, and out of which a handful of students clear NEET PG in their first attempt. There is no concept of placements in the medical college. Students can just give an interview for the post of MO, i.e., medical officer. The paid internship is mandatory at the end of the course in order to provide exposure to students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped labs, but without Wi-Fi. The library has all the necessary books. Classrooms are well-equipped with a smart board, whiteboard, and blackboard. The mess food is awful. The hostel office carries all the first aid equipment and medicines. The college has a basketball ground, volleyball, tennis, badminton court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: One of the best GMCs in Uttarakhand with a very good internship program.

content.Placements: The internship program is very good, with Rs. 15,000 given each month during the internship period. The college hospital also has a good patient inflow. Internships are done in the hospital affiliated with the college. It is compulsory for everyone to complete the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty average, as expected from any GMC. The campus is large, with a football ground and volleyball court. The hostel is good, with three-seater rooms provided to students. Laundry service is available. The hostel mess is average, offering different food items on different days. The food is hygienic, though there are some issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A brief overview of the Government Doon Medical College.

content.Placements: 150 students got placed from the college at the time of my admission in 2024. Students are placed in the hospital that is affiliated with the college, and during internship, interns receive a stipend of Rs. 17,000 per month. Every student needs to do an internship in a hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Cambus is big and well supported with various facilities. Various facilities in different departments of the college are provided. There are 5 lecture halls and every department is well-equipped with Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are pretty good. There are 3-seater and 2-seater rooms available. College is well-equipped with a badminton court and various indoor sports facilities. Hostel food is good, healthy, and hygienic. Different food is provided on different days.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Placements are not given in our course but in previous years, students who take the bond are placed in areas as medical officer. 100% of students got internships from our course. The top role is medical officer. The highest package is up to 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our classrooms are well-built. Classrooms have AC and fans. The quality of facilities provided in the hospital is also good. They have a big mess and a big kitchen. But the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is not good. Medical facilities are also provided in the hostel for emergencies. The sports facilities are also provided in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: No students were placed in our course. Students who have taken the bond facility are placed in some areas, and the highest package offered in our course is up to Rs. 1,00,000, while the lowest is up to Rs. 60,000. 100% of the students got internships from our course. The top role offered in our course is medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well built, with the facility of AC and smart boards. The legs are well developed, with everything available according to the needs of the students. The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel is up to the mark; the facility of a lift is also available in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is not satisfactory. The facilities for medical care are provided in the hostel, and sports and games facilities are also available.

Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Paediatrics, with a round 3 closing rank of 8527 for the General AI category.
