reviews.review_heading: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun, has amazing faculty members and a course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, but without Wi-Fi. The library has all the necessary books. Classrooms are well-equipped with a smart board, whiteboard, and blackboard. The mess food is awful. The hostel office carries all the first aid equipment and medicines. The college has a basketball ground, volleyball, tennis, badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best GMCs in Uttarakhand with a very good internship program.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty average, as expected from any GMC. The campus is large, with a football ground and volleyball court. The hostel is good, with three-seater rooms provided to students. Laundry service is available. The hostel mess is average, offering different food items on different days. The food is hygienic, though there are some issues.

reviews.review_heading: A brief overview of the Government Doon Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Cambus is big and well supported with various facilities. Various facilities in different departments of the college are provided. There are 5 lecture halls and every department is well-equipped with Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are pretty good. There are 3-seater and 2-seater rooms available. College is well-equipped with a badminton court and various indoor sports facilities. Hostel food is good, healthy, and hygienic. Different food is provided on differ...

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our classrooms are well-built. Classrooms have AC and fans. The quality of facilities provided in the hospital is also good. They have a big mess and a big kitchen. But the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is not good. Medical facilities are also provided in the hostel for emergencies. The sports facilities are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well built, with the facility of AC and smart boards. The legs are well developed, with everything available according to the needs of the students. The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel is up to the mark; the facility of a lift is also available in the hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is not satisfactory. The facilities for medical care are provided in the hostel, and sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are top class with AC, and the libraries are also first class with AC and a maximum number of books and novels available there, the quality of the facilities provided in the hospital is good, but the quality of food available in the mess, canteens, and medical facilities is not good. Facilities for sports and games are also available with a well-developed ground.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college from teaching to extra-curricular it is awesome.
reviews.review_text: Compared to other college hostels it is much better to power with a private college. Hostels facilities include 2 to 3-seater rooms and single rooms in 4th and internship years. A study room is equipped with AC and Wi-Fi. Common bathroom for 6 rooms and common room with indoor games are available. There are trained guards on duty 24/7. Separate floor for first years to prevent ragging. Lift facilities are available. Daily cleaning and mosquito repellant sprayed daily. Common room with AC facilit...

reviews.review_heading: GDMC is emerging as a solid government medical institution, strong on infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-maintained hostel and administrative block. Lecture theatre is fully air-conditioned. Digital learning is available. Hostel rooms are of two types, three-tier and two-tier. From the first year to 3rd year, you are supposed to share a room with either one or two people. Facilities are good. The time-bound hostel entry is strictly followed and could be a merit or demerit for many.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at this Government Medical College has been highly enriching.
reviews.review_text: College has a well-developed campus with modern infrastructure. Lecture halls are spacious, air-conditioned, and equipped with smart boards and audio systems. Labs are well-equipped for anatomy, physiology, and biochemistry practicals. Library is well-stocked with medical textbooks, journals and online access to databases like PubMed. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, Wi-Fi and regular housekeeping. Mess provides hygienic food with both veg and non-veg options.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government medical college with decent infrastructure. It is highly recommend.
reviews.review_text: Since the college is not that old and opened in 2016, the college has modern architecture with a fully air-conditioned lecture theatre with a capacity of 200 students. It has an auditorium and good labs. The hostel is decent with an average mess. The canteen is available within the campus premises. Sports facilities are available. There is a separate hostel for intern doctors.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: My college provides very nice classrooms. They are fully air-conditioned, and all facilities are available. There are two libraries in my college. The hostel is also very good. The canteen offers average food, but it is cost-effective. There is also Wi-Fi in both libraries. We go to the library every day to get books. Our college also provides sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Food quality provided in the mess is average as per the hostel, medium in calories, and protein-rich. A playground is present in the college and is in working condition. The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good. The lecture theatres are in good condition and equipped with AC and Wi-Fi. The library is good, with a large number of books available. However, the food provided in the mess is not good and lacks hygiene. Medical facilities are also provided, along with sports...

reviews.review_heading: It is a worthy college if we want to practice a course like MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The library is fully air-conditioned and enabled with 5G Wi-Fi services. The hostel room quality is good. Rooms are spacious and janitor services are provided. The mess food is average. The campus is not huge but has enough sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has good academics and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: There is a canteen and mess for students. The library is available with many medical books and it is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available for students. Sports grounds are available for students to play various sports like basketball, cricket, badminton, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good. The lecture theatres are in excellent condition and provided with AC and Wi-Fi. The library is good, with a maximum number of books available. The quality of food provided in the mess is not good and not hygienic. Medical facilities are also provided, along with sports and games facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Glimpse of my college Hims Sitapur.

review_content.Placements: A total of 5 batches study in the college. Every year, a new batch comes with a strength of 150 students. Moreover, from next year onwards, 250 seats will be available for MBBS students. There is very good clinical exposure for students, so there is a high chance of getting a job in a reputed hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel fees are 1,50,000 per year (Non-AC). For AC accommodation, the hostel fee is 1,75,000 per year, excluding electricity charges. In one room, two or three students accommodate together. It is variable as per the strength of the batch. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, but quite dissatisfied with power cutouts & water quality.

review_content.Placements: My batch is 2021. In a single batch, about 150 students are present. The batch is further divided into groups of 25 for clinical postings. Those who cleared NEET with at least 50 percentile are allowed admission to any private medical college, including this one. After completing your final year professional exam, after the results are out, you're eligible to be an intern at the medical college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college building has DH halls for anatomy and labs for other subjects, including biochemistry, physiology, pathology, and pharmacology, with all the necessary equipment. Further, we have skill labs where mannequins are present to practice skills. The building also has a library and an internal room consisting of various books available for different subjects. The lecture halls are equipped with air conditioning, which can be non-functional at times. But overall, the college administrative block provides a good environment for studying. College hostel rooms are spacious; one room is for 3 roommates with attached washrooms. Every single room has a balcony, too. The food in the mess is okay. The menu is diverse and is changed in summers and winters. Snacks are included in mess food too. Our college has different sports teams; the most influential of them all is our football team, which has won many tournaments across different colleges in the state.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The beauty of medical college is about fees and infrastructure.

content.Placements: We are students of HIMS batch of 2022. The total number of students enrolled here in our class is not more than 150. All students of this institute secured internships for free which is of 1 year at least. The package after completion of course is Rs. 60,000 to 1.20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The well-maintained environment makes students easier to gain and retain things of medical stuff. Cleanliness is well-maintained as it is a private institute. Free Wi-Fi is available for all students but there is a connectivity problem. We all have a mess where we get seasonal fruits and vegetables.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is best. If you are ready to pay fees, it is better than a deemed university.

content.Placements: You need a minimum of 500 marks in NEET UG to get an MBBS degree. After that, you can earn up to 85 thousand. It is a private medical college in UP, and the lowest fees here are 12 Lacs, while other colleges charge more than 14 Lacs per year. But we have to pay 50,000 extra every year as exam charges.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library, cafeteria, and the mess is clean and clear. We have separate washrooms in every room. One room is shared by 3 people, with 3 cupboards. There is a garden. Overall, it is better than other government colleges. We have huge cadavers and excellent patient flow in all departments.

content.Infrastructure: Hostel fees are 1,50,000 per year (Non-AC). For AC accommodation, the hostel fee is 1,75,000 per year, excluding electricity charges. In one room, two or three students accommodate together. It is variable as per the strength of the batch. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, but quite dissatisfied with power cutouts & water quality.

content.Placements: My batch is 2021. In a single batch, about 150 students are present. The batch is further divided into groups of 25 for clinical postings. Those who cleared NEET with at least 50 percentile are allowed admission to any private medical college, including this one. After completing your final year professional exam, after the results are out, you're eligible to be an intern at the medical college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college building has DH halls for anatomy and labs for other subjects, including biochemistry, physiology, pathology, and pharmacology, with all the necessary equipment. Further, we have skill labs where mannequins are present to practice skills. The building also has a library and an internal room consisting of various books available for different subjects. The lecture halls are equipped with air conditioning, which can be non-functional at times. But overall, the college administrative block provides a good environment for studying. College hostel rooms are spacious; one room is for 3 roommates with attached washrooms. Every single room has a balcony, too. The food in the mess is okay. The menu is diverse and is changed in summers and winters. Snacks are included in mess food too. Our college has different sports teams; the most influential of them all is our football team, which has won many tournaments across different colleges in the state.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The degree is novel; admissions are noteworthy in our college with all facilities.

content.Placements: A total of 150 students are enrolled in MBBS at our college in one batch. Internships are mandatory at our college itself. Our seniors are getting jobs in top medical colleges and hospitals in India. Packages after MBBS from our college range from 6 Lacs to 12 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are good; we have a library, a good lecture theater, and Wi-Fi labs also. Hostels for the students are also very good. There are three-occupancy hostels for students, but the rooms are spacious and have attached washrooms.

reviews.review_text: The well-maintained environment makes students easier to gain and retain things of medical stuff. Cleanliness is well-maintained as it is a private institute. Free Wi-Fi is available for all students but there is a connectivity problem. We all have a mess where we get seasonal fruits and vegetables.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is best. If you are ready to pay fees, it is better than a deemed university.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, cafeteria, and the mess is clean and clear. We have separate washrooms in every room. One room is shared by 3 people, with 3 cupboards. There is a garden. Overall, it is better than other government colleges. We have huge cadavers and excellent patient flow in all departments.

reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good; we have a library, a good lecture theater, and Wi-Fi labs also. Hostels for the students are also very good. There are three-occupancy hostels for students, but the rooms are spacious and have attached washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Hostels were better. Triple-occupancy rooms were available in the hostel. Classrooms were well-ventilated. There were no free Wi-Fi services. We also had a central library in this college. Classrooms were air-conditioned. The food served in the mess was average.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with low fees.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure with separate hostels for boys and girls. The floor is allotted to each batch. Our college comprises a multispeciality hospital, admin block, PGs residence, nursing college and hostel, MBBS college and hospital, and a playground. It is spread over 120 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure with good education and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has all the necessary facilities such as air-conditioners, solar geysers, RO water, and 24 hours electricity supply. Mess food is average but the menu is different all the days. All types of sports such as football, cricket, and badminton are played in our college. Canteen and cafe are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hind Institute of Medical Sciences, Sitapur.
reviews.review_text: We have huge classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, and a central library with lots of books. The hostel room is triple shared. We have separate hostels for boys and girls. Mess food is edible and good by standards. A large playground is also present along with a gymnasium.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college for hard-working students.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a big library in the academic building. The laboratories are well-equipped and all necessary practicals are done on an individual basis. Hostels are spacious with attached washrooms. Sweepers are also available daily. Mess food is average. The canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: If you take admission in HIMS, you will become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided in our college like a hostel with Wi-Fi, etc. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. There are laboratories, air-conditioned classrooms, 2 libraries and a central library in which all books related to our courses are provided. There is an exit library in which we can bring our own books and study. All medical facilities are available in our college. Students can play various games like basketball, football, badminton, cricket, volleyball and indoor games li...

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members and average hostel facility.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food served here is good and not very best. The canteen and other things are also good. Hostel facilities like cleanliness are good every day, and sweepers clean the rooms and bathrooms. Medical facilities are always active 24x7 in normal situations. There are green trees and grass all over the campus. Other than academic things, you should try to play outdoor sports also for the refreshment of mind.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with supportive faculty, good placements, and modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was quite good. It included well-equipped classrooms. There were computer labs, digital library, Wi-Fi, and seminar halls were clean. The hostel provided decent accommodation. It had proper water and electricity facilities. The mess food quality was average but hygienic. The canteen offered good food options. Medical facilities were available on campus. Sports grounds and indoor games were available for recreation. Overall, the environment was student-friendly and supp...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of the faculty and the environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of my college were very excellent. The quality of the hostel was nice because there was proper ventilation. There was an environment of study in the hostel.

We have total 4 lecture theatres and well equipped labs of non clinical subjects and a good spacious DH in which there are adequate cadavers and bones

Punjab University Patiala offers a diverse range of programmes to students. The university offers BTech and MBA programme to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Punjabi University courses are offered in full-time mode in several specialisations.
Some of the popular specialisations offered under the BTech programme are Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, and more. These courses are highly sought after among students for their placements and career growth with MBA graduates able to take on roles under business analytics, as consultants or even leadership positions. While BTech graduates can take up a range of technical roles. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Punjab University Patiala in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Hostel fees for Engineering Hostels (I. e. Band Singh Bahadur, Mai Bhago Hostel & Bebe Nanki) is INR 920 per month whereas for other Hostels it is INR 420 per month. There are six residential Hostels for boys and seven residential Hostels for girls. The Hostels have all modern amenities for comfortable living for 4000 students. The hostels are given on a merit basis only. The students of low-income groups can be given free accommodation in the University Hostels. Residents of a hostel, where a cooperative mess is being run shall have to pay INR 5000 in advance as a mess bill. This amount is refundable/adjustable as and when the student leaves the hostel or the mess is closed permanently.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Punjabi University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc Programmes offered at Punjabi University is between INR 8,060 to INR 4.80 lakh. Punjabi University offers BSc In various specialisations. The duration of the course is 3 years. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks in aggregate in any discipline. Punjabi University admissions are offered on the basis of merit in the qualifying examination and for some courses marks obtained in the entrance examination. The university conducts an interview for admission to every course.

overview_faqs.question: Is admission to Punjabi University worth it?
overview_faqs.answer: Punjabi University, Patiala, has kept up its spree of winning the highest A grade on a four-point scale amongst over 350 universities in the country. The status is awarded by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). Punjabi University offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate and Doctorate degree programmes. Candidates can apply online for registration. Punjabi University offers courses in the fields of Pharmacy, Library sciences, Management, Commerce, Languages, Computer Application, Performing Arts, Law, Engineering, and Business Administration. The university also has the provision of Lateral entry for some courses.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BA course at Punjabi University Patiala?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BA Courses is between INR 25,560 to INR 4.12 Lacs. Punjabi University offers BA. In various fields of Humanities and Languages. Candidates who wish to take admission to these courses should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria. The basic criteria are that Candidate should have passed Class 12 with at least 50 percent marks in aggregate in any discipline. The Selection will be made on the 70 and 30 ratios. 70 percent weightage will be given to the qualifying examination and 30 percent to the aptitude test/Audition/Interview.

review_summary.college_name: Punjabi University Patiala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.

content.Placements: In the session of 2024-25, there are 75% students got placements in CSE in startup and non-technical companies. The highest package in this session 2025 was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. If we come to average, it is around 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internship opportunity offered by startup companies. Roles offered are system analyst, full-stack developer, and senior testing engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is also available. Labs are well-equipped with modern computers, machines, and tools.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Crazy campus Life, low study stress.

content.Placements: I have given 2 stars in case of placements because placements are not done properly in our course. A few of the students get recruited via teachers references, whereas others, vice versa, have to find jobs by themselves. I must say our alumni are most connected to the tour department, and teachers can actually help us get into the good institutions like Indian Express, local Punjab channel, AIR, and web channel.
content.Infrastructure: Our department is good, they have 2 Studios. One has a teleprompter, cameras, and a recording studio, while the other one is audio studio for recording audio and podcasts. But the infrastructure is not as much as required for the course. The media department needs more infrastructure. While the university in general is very good, they have Wi-Fi all over the campus. A big library and reading room on the campus. Every hostel has its own reading rooms. Mess food is affordable, and canteen food is amazing and affordable. Campus Life is amazing.

individual_reviews.course: M.B.A. (Five Years Integrated Programme) in Financial Markets and Applied Management - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The college helps provide practical knowledge.

content.Placements: Our department provides placements after the third year, and many companies visit for placements. Recently, Infosys visited. I don't know exactly the package, but it was around 2-3 LPA. Infosys is considered a top recruiting company. Almost 90 percent of students get placements. Top roles help in gaining practical knowledge and real-life case studies.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: I am in my 3rd year, and approximately 30 percent of students get placement from this college. The highest package offered is 20 LPA. Top one that Microsoft visited once, but now Infosys comes here for placement. Internship in the 8th sem is totally about it, so every student has to make a project, which is considered as training time. Data handling, Software, AI expert, and for research too.
content.Infrastructure: It has almost all kinds of facilities, good water, all labs have AC, the lecture hall has projectors, and the library area is good. The quality of food is average, but it has a canteen, Wi-Fi in the hostel too, and medical facilities all the time, and time to time events for hostelers at least once a year have been done.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College does not have proper infrastructure.

content.Placements: In this college, not many companies come for placements. This college does not have proper guidance for students. Students are struggling for placements. The college is not utilized properly. They have zero percent of students who have received an internship from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Mess and canteen food are very bad, they do not clean properly. Only 50 student seats can be accommodated in the one-time library. The college has not been cleaned properly. Classrooms are not clean. This college does not have Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are very bad.

admission_process.title: Punjabi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Punjabi University admissionsare based on entrance exam scores or merit. The university accepts scores in JEE Main, GATE, etc. for specific courses. The university offers in Engineering, Law, Science, Arts, etc. Punjabi University offers programmes at UG and PG levels.

Punjabi University shortlists  candidates based on entrance exam scores for a few courses. Admission to most of the courses is based on the qualifying exam. Candidates also have to further participate in the Punjabi University counselling process. Check below popular courses of Punjabi University along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and English as their subjects with a minimum of 50% aggregate (for General Category)
Graduation with 50% (45% for SC/ST & Disabled Persons Categories)
Graduation with 45% - 50%.
COAP Counselling
(50% marks in the Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
candidates must have a minimum of 50% marks in their Bachelor's/Master's Degree examination (45% marks for candidates belonging to the SC/ST category and individuals with at least 40% disability)
Merit- Based
50% marks in class 12 examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
50% marks in class 12 examination (45% marks for SC/ST and handicapped with at least 40% disability)
Merit Based
Check below step-wise Punjabi University admission process:
1: Punjabi University Application Process
Aspirants have to fill out the application form for the preferred course on the university's website. Candidates need to pay an application fee and upload the documents to submit the form.
2: Selection
The university accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE for MTech. The selection for most of the other courses based on merit.
3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Selected aspirants have to further participate in the counselling rounds. The seats are allotted to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Punjabi University check out the below videos:

placement_data.title: Punjabi University Patiala Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Punjabi University has released the placement details for its Engineering and MCA batch 2025. A total of 17 recruiters participated during Punjabi University placements 2025 and presented various job offers to the BTech and MCA batch 2025. The highest package secured by students was INR 6 LPA whereas the lowest salary achieved was INR 2.65 LA. The top recruiters of Punjabi University Patiala in 2025 include Zoxima Solutions, Infosys, SafeAeon,Quark Software, etc.
Earlier, the highest package secured by batch 2024 stood at INR 11 LPA. In 2023 , over 35 recruiters participated and presented more than 141 job offers to the students.

faqs.answer: The average package offered at Punjabi University placements 2024 is yet to be released on the official website. However, the Punjabi University average package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 5 LPA. The same is presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Average package INR 5 LPA Additionally, Punjabi University has released the median package offered in 2023 in the NIRF report 2024. highlights.description: Punjabi University Patiala is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #59 in the Pharmacy category. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Punjabi University Patiala rankings.

rankings.highlight: 8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Punjab In 2025

nirf.description:
Punjabi University Patiala has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala fell 13 ranks to #59 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjabi University Patiala's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Baba Farid College, Baba Farid Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.
reviews.review_text: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is als...

reviews.review_heading: Crazy campus Life, low study stress.
reviews.review_text: Our department is good, they have 2 Studios. One has a teleprompter, cameras, and a recording studio, while the other one is audio studio for recording audio and podcasts. But the infrastructure is not as much as required for the course. The media department needs more infrastructure. While the university in general is very good, they have Wi-Fi all over the campus. A big library and reading room on the campus. Every hostel has its own reading rooms. Mess food is affordable, and canteen food is ...

reviews.review_heading: The college helps provide practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities and infrastructure available, such as Wi-Fi for every hostel student, good classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel is also quite good. New hostels are being built for students. The food provided is liked by everyone, and I like it too.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: It has almost all kinds of facilities, good water, all labs have AC, the lecture hall has projectors, and the library area is good. The quality of food is average, but it has a canteen, Wi-Fi in the hostel too, and medical facilities all the time, and time to time events for hostelers at least once a year have been done.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Ranbir CollegeReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College does not have proper infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Mess and canteen food are very bad, they do not clean properly. Only 50 student seats can be accommodated in the one-time library. The college has not been cleaned properly. Classrooms are not clean. This college does not have Wi-Fi for students, and the labs are very bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Mata Gujri CollegeReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's an autonomous organisation.
reviews.review_text: This was a kind of conservative and also autonomous college. Libraries were like a mini knowledge hub with maximum collections of books and also available with soft copies which should be accessible by all the students studying in the college. The special access card for visiting libraries and laboratories was provided to all the students.

reviews.review_heading: This is my favorite university.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with all facilities on the campus, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, library, etc. The hotel facilities include AC rooms, RO Water, Wi-Fi, etc. The quality of food is poor. It is anyway, and the canteen is not even compulsory. We have infrastructure facilities for sports and games as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Lamrin Tech Skills UniversityReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall average experience with decent facilities, basic placements, and scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available, and they serve the purpose well. The hostel and mess also cover the basic needs, the food is manageable, and the canteen options are also too. Medical support, sports, and games are provided, though somewhere the infrastructure lags.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Doaba Group of Colleges, MohaliReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Manonmaniam Sundaranar University CollegeReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for nature lovers.
reviews.review_text: The campus has full Wi-Fi. It is full of nature with trees on all sides. It is good for photography. The hostel is good with neat rooms. The food is better. The library has books for all entrance exams, like NEET, GATE, government exams, etc. Classrooms are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus Life.
reviews.review_text: GCCBA 50  BBA department has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a well equipped library. Hostel offers clean rooms and basic amenities. Mess food is nutritious, and the canteen is affordable. Medical aid is available on campus. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games, promoting fitness and teamwork.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Strong faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: GCCBA 50 offers SMART classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a well-stocked library for BBA students. Hostel has clean rooms, study areas, and basic amenities. Mess serves balanced meals, though variety could improve. The canteen is affordable and a popular hangout spot for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Baba Farid College, Baba Farid Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good and excellent. Good facilities are provided.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of this college include a van facility for students who are from different places, and the infrastructure of this college is good. The college is a fully AC campus with libraries, classrooms, etc. Wi-Fi is available on this campus, and the food facilities are good in the hostel. Sports are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College of Commerce and Business AdministrationReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but scope for more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college offers Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, computer labs, and a good library. The infrastructure is well-maintained and suitable for academic needs. The hostel is clean with basic amenities. Food in the mess is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports options include a basketball court, cricket ground, and indoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Aryans Group of CollegesReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I will say one thing, this is the best college. Take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were incredible. Everything was excellent, and they took care of the students well. Hostel was on the side of college with a good environment and healthy food. The wardens there were very helpful and took care of every student like they were in their home.

college_info.intro: Byramjee Jeejeebhoy Government Medical College and Sassoon General Hospitals offers several UG, PG, Advanced Masters, Doctorate and Post Doctorate level courses in the stream of Medicine and Health Sciences. The popular programmes at BJGMC Pune include MD, MS, BSc, and MBBS, among others. The courses are offered across multiple specialisations in full-time mode.

reviews_list.review_title: Offering good-quality infrastructure and the best-quality teaching.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers very good placement opportunities to its students. All the students get placed in the MBBS course. The average package offered at the college was between 7 and 10 LPA. One hundred percent of students got internships from our course. The top roles offered were doctors, surgeons, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good-quality facilities available for our course. The infrastructure of the college was good. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, classrooms, etc. were the facilities available on the campus. Hostel facilities were available for the students. All the facilities available at the hostel were of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in this course. No companies visit our college for recruitment. Many students got internships and served a bond for 1 year.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are decent in this college. The food quality is good. Sports are conducted. We also have a big cricket ground on our campus. Hostel buildings are old.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are average. The course curriculum is great. They teach practical aspects of being a doctor. Laboratory is decent in this college. We also have an auditorium on our campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: True Review about infra and hostel.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent students were placed in MBBS course. 13000 rupees are paid in internship by the over Government to the students. 100 percent MBBS doctor are placed in job by the government or by the private hospitals. Top role is depend on our qualifications.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are good. As hostels are very cheap which is very important for the Bachelor as the get less money from their home. Hostel rooms have Wi-Fi enabled campus. With such a beautiful greenery in the campus. Hostel has zero electricity bill.

review_summary.college_name: BJGMC Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My dream college: B.J.M.C., Pune.

content.Placements: All students who pass the final year get an internship in the same hospital, which is for one year. After that, they have to give NEET PG, and if they get selected, they can opt for various branches according to their score and do the residency in the hospital. Great jobs are available in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The college has various clubs, labs, a gym, and classrooms. It is a 3-floor building with a central library and Wi-Fi. The hostel has various required amenities which are affordable at just 4000 per year, clean drinking water, canteen, mess, ground, and a clean environment. It has a dedicated hostel managing and mess managing committee.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements. Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure .

content.Placements: The placement cell takes an active role in ensuring that students have access to a variety of work prospects at reputable hospitals and healthcare institutions. The college's extensive network of leading medical facilities has tremendously helped the placement.
content.Infrastructure: Different classrooms and libraries are present for different subjects. The college also has a central library. The facilities in my hostel are very good and the food quality is fine. Various extracurricular activities and events occur frequently at my college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Offering good-quality infrastructure and the best-quality teaching.

content.Placements: Our college offers very good placement opportunities to its students. All the students get placed in the MBBS course. The average package offered at the college was between 7 and 10 LPA. One hundred percent of students got internships from our course. The top roles offered were doctors, surgeons, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good-quality facilities available for our course. The infrastructure of the college was good. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, classrooms, etc. were the facilities available on the campus. Hostel facilities were available for the students. All the facilities available at the hostel were of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this course. No companies visit our college for recruitment. Many students got internships and served a bond for 1 year.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are decent in this college. The food quality is good. Sports are conducted. We also have a big cricket ground on our campus. Hostel buildings are old.
content.Faculty: Teachers are average. The course curriculum is great. They teach practical aspects of being a doctor. Laboratory is decent in this college. We also have an auditorium on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: True Review about infra and hostel.

content.Placements: 90 percent students were placed in MBBS course. 13000 rupees are paid in internship by the over Government to the students. 100 percent MBBS doctor are placed in job by the government or by the private hospitals. Top role is depend on our qualifications.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are good. As hostels are very cheap which is very important for the Bachelor as the get less money from their home. Hostel rooms have Wi-Fi enabled campus. With such a beautiful greenery in the campus. Hostel has zero electricity bill.

reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. As hostels are very cheap which is very important for the Bachelor as the get less money from their home. Hostel rooms have Wi-Fi enabled campus. With such a beautiful greenery in the campus. Hostel has zero electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best government medical college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average because this college is old. Hostels are very good and we a garden on our campus. The hostel is surrounded by trees. The food served in the mess is good. It has seven days daily routine. It also offers 3 times non-vegetarian food items in a week. There are 1,500 beds in our hospital, and it provides better facilities for the patients.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms of the college are massive and have proper sitting arrangement proper ventilation and are well lit. Each classroom has a projector and x-ray viewing display area and 2 blackboards. A separate ground is provided for the college students for sports activity. A badminton court is also provided. Hostel: All basic facilities are provided, lights water, beds cupboard, etc. Hot water facilities are there. The meal quality is decent. It provides all-round nutrition. 2 times non-veg in a w...

reviews.review_heading: It is a fantastic college in all aspects and a dream of every NEET aspirant in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is really very good with a minimal cost of 4,000 per annum, with great natural beauty and neat and tidy rooms and washrooms. There are Aquaguards on each floor for ease of students. Mess and canteen are available with hygienic food and water.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Byramjee Jeejeebhoy Government Medical College and Sassoon General Hospitals.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure for studies, practicals, and for the practice of students with high equipped labs. Wi-Fi facility is available in every department. There is a central library with a hostel facility inside the campus. The mess provides good food. It has a large sports ground and gym facility.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good with a minimal cost of Rs. 4,000 per year with great natural beauty and neat rooms and parks. There are aqua guards on each floor and a set of guards for the safety of students. There are a mess and a canteen with hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Byramjee Jeejeebhoy Government Medical College and Sassoon General Hospitals.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel is quite good, but the quality of food served in a mess is not good. They provide a single room for five students, which is quite inconvenient. On some days in a week, like Wednesday, Friday, and Sunday, they provide a special diet. The mess remains close on Sunday evening. The infrastructure of the college is mind-blowing. The hospital is large with a great out-patient number. So it is a great college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Byramjee Jeejeebhoy Government Medical College and Sassoon General Hospitals.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with a well-established library, reading room, auditorium, and lecture halls. It also has well-equipped labs and a Wi-Fi facility. One of the hostel blocks is considered a heritage site by the archaeological survey of India. The quality of the food served is good. It also has a large ground and a gym facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and adequate for the student intake. It has well-equipped practical laboratories and infrastructure. The hostel is also very good. It has lush green trees, and Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel premises. There is a mess and reading room in the hostel campus, and also mini football and volleyball ground are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with this college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Girls hostels are excellently built, I must say they are comparable to a decent private hostel with basic furniture provided and renovated common washrooms. Students have separate blocks for different year students. Main and block, recently they are shifting various departments to newly built 13 storied building which is beautifully built, students have reading rooms in college and hostel multiple mess facilities with pay and eat service, local book, and utility store built in the college buildi...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty and placement .
reviews.review_text: Our college have a large infrastructure as it is the one of the oldest government medical college in Maharashtra. Hostels accommodate around 1000 students. College have 2 big libraries, And there are large reading room at each hostel. Mess is also available with delicious and nutritious food.

faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, the CUET registration 2026 process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribed CUET eligibility criteria to qualify for the entrance exam.
faqs.question: Q: Is CUET exam registration open?

faqs.answer: CAT question papers are released within a week of the exam in the form of a PDF as a response sheet and answer key. Candidates who have appeared for the test are able to access the CAT question paper and answer key. The question paper of every slot is released on the same day along with candidate response sheet and official answer to all question. If any candidate needs previous year CAT question papers for preparation purpose, then they can download them from Shiksha website. We have hosted last five years' CAT question papers for aspirants to download and practice. These official CAT question papers are available for download free. You can download the CAT question paper PDFs at this link: https://www.shiksha.com/mba/cat-exam-question-papers Candidates must check and practice the latest CAT question paper to know the latest exam pattern and difficulty level.
faqs.question: Q: From where can I download CAT question papers?

faqs.answer: National Testing Agency re-commenced CUET 2026 registration on February 23, 2026. Soon after the release of the CUET notification, candidates can check the important dates about CUET 2026. The last date for CUET 2026 registration was February 26, 2026 (11.50 PM).Candidates were required to fill the CUET application form within the given time frame, failing which no request for extension of the CUET registration last date will be entertained. NTA does not provide the window for late fee payment. CUET 2026 application process is in online mode. No physical copies of the CUET application form must be sent to the authorities.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date for filling CUET application form?

faqs.answer: Candidates had to follow the method given below to fill the CUET PG 2026 application form.Visit the exam portalRead the instructions and select the agreement checkbox, followed by clicking on the tab Click Here to ProceedEnter personal detailsChoose password and security question and enter captchaLog in with the credentials to complete the application processComplete the CUET PG 2026 application form by entering the information related to personal details, paper selection, exam cities and educational detailsUpload photograph and signatureUpload realtime photograph captured through web cameraPay the application fee through Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking or UPI.After this, the application confirmation page will be generated, which has to be downloaded and printed.The document should be saved till the admission process is completed. Applicants are also provided with an application correction facility to make necessary changes to the form.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanskriti University Admission 2025

admission_process.title: Sanskriti University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sanskrit University offers UG and PG for admission 2025. Candidate's UG academic programmes determine their eligibility for postgraduate studies. For diploma courses, applicants must have finished Class 10 with at least 50%. Sanskrit University offers four years of full-time BTech in various Engineering specialisations.The candidates' performance on their qualifying exams determines their admission to these programmes.

For Sanskriti University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toSanskriti University courseadmissions 2025:

Sanskriti University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Sanskriti University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

Applicants can obtain the application form from the official Sanskriti University website to start the admissions process. Candidates can send the completed form to the appropriate department at Sanskriti University in person or by mail. Candidates must submit their application form online with two copies of their online bank challan and a pay slip to complete the application and entrance exam costs.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission 2025 to Sanskrit University's UG and PG programmes is determined by entrance exams. For the applicable courses, candidates must be eligible to take admission exams at the state or university levels, such as the CAT or MAT. Furthermore, the undergraduate programmes provided by associated institutions are determined by the merit scores earned in the most recent qualifying test.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

Following the conclusion of the selection stages, applicants take part in the course counselling process. The chosen applicants are then included on merit lists, which are released by Sanskriti University in several rounds. To reserve a place, those whose names are on the merit list must pay a certain amount.

hostel.description: University has separate hostels for both boys and girls at present there are 5 hostels out of which 4 for boys and within campus and one is for girls which is off campus. Spacious rooms with necessary furniture are provide. 24*7 internet facility & water supply facility is available. other than that drinking water, facilities for both indoor and outdoor games and mess facility is provided. AC and non AC room is available for the students.

library.description: The library is well-stocked with more than 25,000 books. It subscribes to approximately 50 Indian and 25 foreign journals apart from e-journals and comprises of both national and international journal. Book bank facility is provided to the students. Digital library is linked to DELNET. It provides the facility of inter-connection of all libraries registered under DELNET scheme. This facilitates access to a wide range of book, journals, magazines, etc.The library has reprographic facility, reading hall,digital and webinar facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience at Sanskriti University.
reviews.review_text: The university provide updated study model with advanced lab facilities and with high tech class room. The hostel provided by the university is very clean, and the mess of the university is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a strong background in management, come to Sanskriti.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a very well-developed infrastructure. The environment of the university is very green and clean. The Sanskriti University provides modern lab facilities to its students and all the basic facilities needed. The classrooms of the Sanskriti University are very well ventilated with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is overall very good for students who want to learn new skills.
reviews.review_text: Sanskriti University provides well-developed and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA students. Classrooms are spacious and clean with basic teaching facilities like projectors and smart boards. There are also high-tech computer labs that provide practical learning experience to students.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to study with a lot of enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Courses are good, and my overall experience is positive. Students get enrolled in the course because of the beautiful environment and natural vibes. The department is friendly. Wi-Fi has good speed. Labs are good and well organized. Classrooms are good. Library is awesome and peaceful place.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good for exposure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and the infrastructure is fantastic. I love it. Their labs, classrooms, and library facilities are also good. The hostels are neat and clean, and 2 or more beds are available in one room. The mess canteen provides good food for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure with proper facilities, best library, best classroom with AC classes, best Wi-Fi facility. There are the best hostel facilities, the quality of food is available here, and a good mess and canteen. The college provides the best medical facilities, sports grounds, and better games.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure. Many students get placed here.
reviews.review_text: The university provides an excellent range of infrastructure that includes library facilities, a mess, and a canteen. It has good campus facilities. There is also a sports zone. There are separate zones for each class of students. There is a good place to study and a great environment.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is best for average students.
reviews.review_text: Our libraries, cafeteria, computer labs, and classrooms are digital. Hostel food is average, and sports fests are held. For medical needs, there's a wellness center and hospital on the second campus, but these facilities aren't utilized. The food available in the mess is average in taste but good in quality, while the canteen offers both good taste and quality.

reviews.review_heading: Best and management faculty members. Good placement and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best facilities were there like Wi-Fi, labs, and best classroom. Best food was provided in hostel mess and canteen. Medical facilities were available. Classrooms were best. Water and canteen facilities were the best. Sports ground was available. Games were played every day. For students, fans and air-coolers were available in any classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskriti University in a positive way.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best and maintained. Some new blocks are ready for students in which new classrooms, labs, and the library are ready. There are two different areas of hostels, one for girls and the other for boys with all types of rooms and facilities. The college provides all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The experience I needed to explore was very satisfying. Even the infrastructure is very friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very friendly and joyful. The classrooms are clean every block has its library and there are 6 computer labs and each lab has around 100 computers. Let's talk about the hostel, there are many options for the hostel room AC, non-AC, sharing rooms, and non-sharing rooms. The food quality is average and the hostel's nature is very excellent.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, 3 seaters to 6 seaters. We can choose anything and fee will be according to that. For 3 seaters and food fee is Rs 60,000 per year. Food is good sometimes not good enough. Everyone will have a table, chair, safe, and bed. Every room has a balcony. The main reason behind choosing this course is my interest in computer science, and the reason behind choosing this department is the placement and seniors/alumni (they are very helpful). Faculty members are also good here. All teachers...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and placements are really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are of good quality, allowing for participation in all activities. The quality of facilities in the hostel, college playground, and so on, is good, and the labs and Wi-Fi in college were useful to students. The medical facilities they provide are good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college, and the environment is mind-blowing.
reviews.review_text: This university provided every kind of facility for students, like proper Wi-Fi connectivity, labs for practicals, classrooms with projectors, and a library with a peaceful environment. The mess food wasn't too good, but if we talk about the canteen, it was good. We also had a hospital inside our college for treatment and a gaming zone also.

reviews.review_heading: Sanskriti university college review .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. The Wi-Fi facility provided in the college and hostel is very poor. Computers do not work properly. Mess food is not good. Sports, games, and e-sports are conducted. There are no good quality products. Walls of the college building are damaged.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best medical college of M. P.

content.Placements: It's a great medical college that provides excellent clinical exposure due to its association with M. Y. Hospital, which has the best patient flow in Madhya Pradesh. The faculty here is highly experienced, with the head having over 10 years of experience at least, and the PGs are also very helpful.
content.Infrastructure: We have a lecture hall for each subject that can easily accommodate more than 250 students at once. We have a library that contains almost all the books required for our course, and if something is not available, they make it available quickly. The hostels are quite spacious and have adequate rooms for all students, along with playground and massage facilities as well.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the course.

content.Placements: All the students get one year of internship at Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College and they are paid for it. Currently, the stipend is Rs 15,000 per month. After that, the person has to qualify for NEET PG to get a post-graduate seat in other medical colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is inclusive of the college building and hospitals like MY Hospital, MTH Hospital of OBS Gynae department, and Chacha Nehru Hospital for Pediatrics department. So, overall the campus is huge and is located at Shivaji Vatika, in front of AICTSL. There are many classrooms and labs in the college. There are different labs for different subjects. Auditorium, reading room, and seminar hall are present in the college as well as in the hospital. Sports facilities are available such as badminton, cricket, table tennis, etc. Canteen is also there in the college.

paragraphs: Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College, Indore admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College, Indoreadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and NEET SS. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,25,000 - 5,31,000for UG, PG and Advanced Masters level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 66 months.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college of M. P.
reviews.review_text: We have a lecture hall for each subject that can easily accommodate more than 250 students at once. We have a library that contains almost all the books required for our course, and if something is not available, they make it available quickly. The hostels are quite spacious and have adequate rooms for all students, along with playground and massage facilities as well.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the course.
reviews.review_text: The campus is inclusive of the college building and hospitals like MY Hospital, MTH Hospital of OBS Gynae department, and Chacha Nehru Hospital for Pediatrics department. So, overall the campus is huge and is located at Shivaji Vatika, in front of AICTSL. There are many classrooms and labs in the college. There are different labs for different subjects. Auditorium, reading room, and seminar hall are present in the college as well as in the hospital. Sports facilities are available such as badmin...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are one of the brightest minds.
reviews.review_text: We have good reading room and a central library. Although infrastructure is not that well but it is getting better day by day. Classrooms are huge. But cleanliness is not maintained that much. Projectors are present in every lecture hall. Laboratory has poor instruments .

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Madhya Pradesh for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has a library, reading room, Wi-Fi, etc. A huge garden is available in our college. The hostel is very good. Around 2 students can stay in each room. The hostel rooms have beds, tables, corridors, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and the hostel is good. Our college has smart classrooms. The lecture hall is equipped with air-conditioners. The hostel rooms are well-furnished. They provide a bed, study table, and bench in each room. They maintain hygiene. They provide clean water. They provide facilities for sports like cricket, badminton, table tennis, etc. Our college has a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: No.1 Medical College of M.P.
reviews.review_text: M.G.M. medical college Indore is a very old and historical college in M.P. and has two buildings: a new building and an old building. The new building contains a very large lecture hall with a capacity of 300 students. The college has a well-equipped lab and library.

reviews.review_heading: The most prestigious and oldest medical college in Madhya Pradesh. All facilities are available.
reviews.review_text:
Labs are good, with full AC classrooms.
The hostel facility is very good. In each room, two students live in one room in the first and second years, but on the third year, a single room can be taken.
Library available, reading room with AC, mess food is good with low cost, and you can play lots of games in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Central India's most prestigious and oldest medical college.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained new air-conditioned lecture halls. The food given in the canteen and mess is nice and economical, with a variety of foods given every day. The hostel has seven blocks for students, and many are under construction. The facilities in the hostel are just perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good to join.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is old. It provides all facilities for students. The new lecture halls are very good. All labs are well-equipped with the latest instruments. The building has a huge library with reading rooms where we can study efficiently. The campus has a canteen. All hostels have two new buildings and two old buildings. The new buildings are good with facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good hospital to explore for all you need in MBBS UG.
reviews.review_text: We have a dissection hall, a reading room, and MY hospital for clinical postings. There is Wi-Fi and air conditioners in the reading room. There is a cricket ground, a badminton court, and a gym in the college. Students get free general treatment from MY Hospital without waiting in a queue. The hostel fee is Rs. 10,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best medical college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the basic facilities that it needs to have. Anatomy labs, biochemistry labs, and physiology labs are well-established as well as top of the line. The microbiology lab is properly equipped and ready for all the tests that it needs to do.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College, Indore.
reviews.review_text: For the MBBS course, there are practical labs where we learn many basic life-saving skills like in the biochemistry lab, we perform many tests. Other facilities like sports, free Wi-Fi, e-library, reading room, and a central library are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college holds an immense legacy and history. Its reputation is also high.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is overall average and is currently under construction. The college is many years old, so the classrooms are often not renovated. Wi-Fi is available. There are two libraries on campus, and a canteen is also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Medical College, Indore
reviews.review_text: Our college campus has almost all facilities. It includes a new building, water coolers, and purifiers. Wi-Fi, a big lecture hall, an auditorium, a playground, a stadium, a garden, and a soothing ambience. The library opens at 7 am and remains open until 12 am. The same applies to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Totally worthy to take admission in mgm Indore.
reviews.review_text:
My college has various departments eg. Physiology, anatomy, biochemistry and many more. All of these are accessible to student during different year of there course. My College is associated with Maharaja yashvantro hospital Indore in which all clinic related posting of student are held. Talking about college hostal, most of the building of hostal are newly build and separate mess for all block. Hostal is on walkable distance from college 
It is provided with a volleyball court and cricket groun...
